ArchMage.sDesc: Mana is a permeating force, present in all life and space. Archmages guide the course of free-flowing mana in the air, creating phenomena in the physical world and altering its course.
aMRM: Archmages read the flow of the Ley Lines around them, regenerating mana only with the use of certain abilities.

passive.desc: Your mastery over the magical arts increases your Hit Chance and Crit Chance by 25%.
Your ability to attune with the mana flow and influence it grants you 15% Haste.

From rank 5, your Sigils can use Arcane Flux to empower you, shifting you between two forms. At rank 10, 10% INT.

Casting Sigil with Arcane Flux shifts you into Corporeal Ascension, giving you 250% END, 60% Crit Chance and a large rapid HoT based on your mana when you cast.

Casting Sigil in Corporeal Ascension shifts you into Astral Ascension, granting you rapid mana regen, 60% DoT damage, 20% Dodge, 5% Haste, and a small rapid HoT based on your mana when you cast.

active.desc: Incant an unavoidable status spell and inflict your foes with Leywilt, reducing Dodge by 35%, damage by 25%, and Crit Chance by 15% for 20 seconds.

Set ablaze the mana current, consuming the foes around you in an intense inferno and thawing any afflicted with Cryostasis. The fire ravenously burns, dealing more damage the lower your MP and leaving your foes burning based on the damage dealt, stacking to 2 and lasting 6 seconds.

Still the flow of the mana stream, flash freezing your foes in place and drawing in 15 mana for yourself. Your foes remain in Cryostasis, reducing their Hit Chance and Damage dealt by 30% while they take 30% increased magic damage for 6 seconds.
Agitated mana bursts forth from you, engulfing your foes in a radiant supernova dealing more damage the lower your life force is.

Inscribe an Arcane Sigil, significantly increasing your magical power. Your Arcane Sigil increases your Damage Dealt by 30% for 30 seconds, but the Overload of the spell increases your mana costs by 50% for 4 seconds and costs 40% of your current health.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

ArchFiend.sDesc: The mighty ArchFiends of the Abyss draw power from the eternal darkness, and wash over their foes in a wave of carnage.
aMRM: ArchFiends gain mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on crits. The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total. The lower your HP, the less mana you'll heal.

passive.desc: Your newfound abyssal lineage increases your effectiveness on the battlefield, increasing Crit Damage by 30%, but reducing your magic damage by 75%.
Your abyssal visage grants you superior reflexes, increasing your hit chance and crit chance by 12%.
Sensing your foes near defeat, below 10% of their health, you have a 25% chance each time you mark your opponent to inflict a heavy DoT.

active.desc: Strike your opponents and curse them with a Mark of Death, increasing the damage they take by 4% for 12 seconds, stacks to 8.
Lash out at your opponent, dealing damage while drawing strength from the Abyss. Applies a stack of ArchFiend’s Mark to yourself, increasing Crit Chance by 5% for 12 seconds, stacks to 8.

Unleash the twisted power of the Abyss onto your opponents. You enter your natural Fiendish state, granting you 25% Haste for 6 seconds while your foes are Consumed by the Abyss, lowering their Dodge by 25% for 6 seconds.

Your abyssal power sends you and your allies into a Fiendish Frenzy, increasing Crit Damage by 120% for 8 seconds. If you have stacks of Archfiend's Mark, also apply Fiend Leech to yourself, a 2 second HoT that increases in power based on the number of Archfiend's Mark stacks.

Bind your opponents to the Abyss. Consumes all stacks of Archfiend's Mark and deals damage based on the amount consumed. Also applies Abyssal Contract for 10 seconds, increasing the physical damage your opponents take by 30%, plus 5% for each stack of Mark of Death they have (up to 70% total).
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Alpha DOOMmega.sDesc: Become the Alpha AND the Omega! The beginning and the end of all your battles starts with... YOU!
aMRM: Alpha Omegans gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Are struck by an enemy in combat

passive.desc: Increase Str by 12%
Physical Damage taken reduced by 20%
DoT damage done increased by 20%

active.desc: You slowly chip away at your opponent. Applies Soul Slash to your opponent, dealing damage over time. Lasts 1 second unless reapplied and doesn't stack. Can't miss.

The chill of death seeps into your foe. Death's Chill deals damage over time while Decay, Cannot Heal prevents an enemy from healing. Also applies Frozen Core which increases all DoT damage and heals received by 5% for 16 seconds and stacks to 5. Auras last 16 seconds unless reapplied. Can't miss.
Causes Frostbite, a damage over time effect that also slows your foe's haste by 20% for 10 seconds. Can't miss.

Causes Deathgrip on your foe. Your foe feels the life slowly crushed out of them causing damage over time and reducing the damage they do by 20% for 15 seconds. Has a 10% chance to stun for 6 seconds. Can't miss.

You tap into the power of Death to pull your form back together. Causes you to heal over time and reduces physical damage you take by 50% for 12 seconds. Also applies Death's Release to your target dealing significant damage after 5 seconds. Can't miss.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Arachnomancer.sDesc: Arachnomancers are masters of the web, and the command of the spiders is at their fingertips. They possess keen intellect of stealth. Their web-weaving skills are only matched by how quickly they can inject toxic venom into their prey.
aMRM: Gains mana when:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits).
-Dodge an attack (restores HP as well).

passive.desc: Your powerful poisons increase the Damage over Time you deal by 18%.
Arachnid instincts drive you to always strike for your opponent’s weakness, increasing Crit Chance by 10%.
Your hunts are blessed by Arachne, increasing your Haste by 10%.

active.desc: Sink your fangs into your opponent, siphoning health from opponents affected by your Venom Fangs.
Bite your target with Venom Fangs, injecting them with a powerful toxin for 4 seconds. Retreat with the grace of an arachnid, increasing your Dodge by 70% for 1 second.

Constrict your opponent with steel-like spider thread coated in poison, causing damage over time for 10 seconds that increases the lower your health is. Retreat with the grace of an arachnid, increasing your Dodge by 70% for 1 second.
A powerful strike of self-abandon that costs 10% of your max HP and tears away at their armor. Inflict your foe with Panic, increasing the DoT they take by 100% for 12 seconds.

Toxic adrenaline flows through your veins and with your webbing, melting your body and your opponent’s armor. Cocoon your foe with your toxic webbing, costing 20% of your max HP, increasing the damage they take by 100% for 12 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Arcana Invoker.sDesc: The Arcana Invoker cycles through the 22 aspects of the Arcana, harnessing their strength in order to unleash the power of The World.
aMRM: The Arcana Invoker regains 15 mana when they strike a target with Arcana Invocation (affected by Mana Consumption).

passive.desc:
Magician: 22% INT
High Priestess: 22% WIS
Empress: HoT
Emperor: 22% outgoing damage
Hierophant: 22% Heal Power
Lovers: 22% END
Chariot: 22% Haste
Justice: 22% Phys and Mag damage
Hermit: 22% Dodge
Wheel of Fortune: 22% LUCK
Strength: 22% STR
Hanged Man: 22% DEX
Death: 22% Crit Damage
Temperance: Enhanced HoT
Devil: 22% Crit Chance
Tower: 22% Phys and Mag Resist
Star: MoT
Moon: -22% Mana Costs
Sun: 22% Hit Chance
Judgement: Awakens The World

Fool: -22% Damage Resist
Magician: -22% damage
High Priestess: -22% Crit Chance
Empress: DoT
Emperor: -22% Damage Resist
Hierophant: -22% DoT Resist
Lovers: 15s Decay
Chariot: -22% Haste 
Justice: -22% Phys/Mag damage
Hermit: -22% Dodge
Wheel of Fortune: -22% Hit Chance
Strength: -22% damage
Hanged Man: 4s stun (50%)
Death: 5s Delayed DoT 
Temperance: Ramping DoT
Devil: -22% Crit Chance
Tower: -22% Phys/Mag Resist
Star: -22% DoT Resist
Moon: -22% Haste 
Sun: -22% Hit Chance
Haste, Hit Chance, and Crit Chance increased by 22%.

active.desc: Deliver a strike with your blade of flesh. Deals physical damage based on your Attack Power and Spell Power.

Begin the cycle anew by summoning The Fool, increasing your Damage Resistance by 80% for 122 seconds. 

If Judgement is active, instead summon The World for 122 seconds, increasing your Damage Resistance by 40% and changing the effects of your other skills. 

If The World is active, instead deals damage based on your stacks of End of the World. 

Using this skill while Judgement isn't active will reset the cycle. Can't miss.

If The Fool is present, summon an Arcana. Arcana are summoned in a set order, with each one granting you a new effect and the effects of all previously summoned Arcana. Each time an Arcana is summoned, your Damage Resistance is reduced by 2% until The World is summoned. 

If The World is active, instead applies End of the World for 8 seconds, increasing the damage of this skill, but reducing your Damage Resistance by 4% for each stack. Recovers 15 mana on hit. Can't miss.

Channel a magical attack through your Arcana, applying a Reversed effect to your target based on your currently summoned Arcana. All effects last 22 seconds unless otherwise specified.

If The Fool is your only active Arcana, applies The Fool (Reversed).

If Judgement is active, deals one time bonus damage to your primary target. 

If The World is active, applies The World (Reversed) for 5 seconds, applying all Reversed stat debuffs and stuns at half potency. Can't miss.

Perform the Arcana's ritual, using your foe as the offering! Applies Sacrifice to your target, increasing the damage they take from each successive hit of this skill by 150%, up to 22 times. 

If The World is active, applies Erasure to your target, a 3 second DoT based on your End of the World stacks.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

ArchPaladin.sDesc: As a warrior in one of the Paladin Order’s highest ranks, you have access to powers the likes of which Lore has not yet seen. Use your newfound abilities to fight for virtue and justice, because darkness will flee at the very sight of your righteous light!
aMRM: ArchPaladins gain mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on crits.  The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total.

passive.desc: Reduces incoming damage by 20%.
Your credence grants you an extra 100% Endurance and 10% hit chance.
Increases outgoing damage by 20% and Haste by 15%.

active.desc: A strong attack known only to disciplined fighters. Damage dealt is based on weapon damage.

Attack with a weapon infused with the power of light, weakening them up to 6 times, lasting 10 seconds. Your foes are commanded by the light, reducing their outgoing damage, Crit Chance, and Hit Chance by 5%, and Dodge and Defense by 10% per stack. Undead foes take extra damage from the holy light.
A forgiving light encompasses you and up to 6 allies, recovering a great amount of health that always crits and granting you 20% defense and END for 15 seconds.
Using holy magic, you temporarily seal the offensive powers of your opponent away. Your foe does 90% less damage for 7 seconds. Undead foes are stunned by the holy power of the seal for 3 seconds.

Invoke your most powerful holy light spell, dealing massive damage to your foes. If your foes are sealed, your holy magic is even stronger, breaking the seal and doing double damage. The effects of the Broken Seal linger, reducing your opponent’s damage dealt by 15% for 25 seconds, stacking up to 2.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Archivist of Time.sDesc: The Archivist serves as the observer of the flow, holding the power to revise timelines as they deviate.
aMRM: Archivists fully restore their mana upon using the Lorebook of Beginnings.

passive.desc: Haste and Outgoing Damage increased by 30%.
Starting at rank 1, your inscriptions bind to the pages, causing all skills to be guaranteed hits.
Crit Chance increased by 15%. The first time Lorebook of Beginnings is used in combat, it applies Epigraph, increasing your Damage Resistance by 50% for 8 seconds.

active.desc: Inscribe Lore, beginning a spell. Rewrite your opponent's timeline, dealing more damage with each stack of Page Turned.

Peer into the library of time, invoking The First Index if you've Inscribed Lore, which is used to apply damaging spells. Applies a different effect based on your currently active Index.

The First Index: This skill deals increased damage
The Second Index: Acutance - +50% Crit Chance for 12s
The Third Index: Fortification - +75% END & -25% mana costs for 12s

Peer into the library of time, invoking The Second Index if you've Inscribed Lore, which is used to apply enchanting spells. Applies a different effect based on your currently active Index.

The First Index: Splotched - DoT based on your target's current HP percentage for 6s
The Second Index: Vehemency - +30% Physical & Magical Damage for 12s
The Third Index: Resiliency - +50% Damage Resistance for 12s

Peer into the library of time, invoking the Third Index if you've Inscribed Lore, which is used to apply protection spells. Applies a different effect based on your currently active Index.

The First Index: Page Turned - Every successive Lorebook of Beginnings does more damage for 24s
The Second Index: Superpower - +30% INT/STR & 15% Luck for 12s
The Third Index: Rewind - HoT for 12s
Rewrite the fabric of time, recasting your previously used spells. Refreshes the duration of all active Index buffs on yourself while granting them to your allies for 12 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Berserker.sDesc: Berserkers are crazed, intensely powerful fighters. They fear nothing, least of all death, and are known to become even more dangerous when wounded.
aMRM: Berserkers gain mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on crits.  The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total.

passive.desc: Increases all damage done by 15%
Damage taken reduced by 10%.

active.desc: A strong attack known only to disciplined fighters. Damage dealt is based on weapon damage.
Deals weapon DPS as damage and reduces opponents damage output significantly for 4 seconds.
Deals 70% of weapon damage, cannot be avoided but also cannot crit.
Deals damage based on the difference between your current and maximum HP.
Increases haste by 25% for 12 seconds. When the effect fades, you will receive a small percentage of damage dealt under its effects as health.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Blaze Binder.sDesc: Blaze Binders control the power of fire and darkness. They are known to burn their enemies to a crisp and bind their souls into service
aMRM: Blaze Binder gain mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on crits.  The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total.

passive.desc: 20% Damage to DoTs
10% Outgoing Damage
Occasionally, your Haste and Mana Regen will GREATLY increase for a short time.

active.desc: Blast your opponents at long range with fire bolts.
Unleash explosive flames on three enemies and then watch them burn with a small DoT for 4 seconds afterwards.

Your smoke is infused with the power of Darkness and causes your opponents to have a reduced chance of hitting you and occasionally stuns them for 3 seconds. Inhaling the smoke also causes a large DoT lasting for 8 seconds.

Kindle a flame within you, setting yourself ablaze. Applies Burning Ward which reduces damage taken by 40% while damaging opponents that attack you for 6 seconds, and Blazing Speed which increases haste by 15% for 14 seconds. You also use your darkness powers to restore your life from the ashes around you to apply an HoT for 8 seconds.

You unleash a devastating burst of Dark Fire on 3 opponents. They all take heavy damage and continue to burn from a reasonable DoT for 8 seconds. The fire will also apply either a 10% DoT damage taken debuff or a -10% damage debuff to your enemy.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Chaos Avenger.sDesc: With powers rivaling those of the former Champion of Chaos, the Chaos Avenger dedicated their existence to defending Lore against any who threatened it. Their endeavours have been lost to time, but one thing is for certain - those who crossed paths with their greatsword, regretted ever doing so.
aMRM: The Chaos Avenger regains 60 mana when they strike a target with Chaos Greatsword (affected by Mana Consumption).

passive.desc: Starting at rank 1, all skills (except Chaos Greatsword) Brand your target. Whenever your Chaos Greatsword strikes a Branded target, the Brand is consumed to deal double damage to them and apply Ravaged, which stacks to 8 and is used for Fury Unleashed.
Strength increased by 50% and Crit Chance increased by 10%
Physical Damage taken reduced by 35% and Endurance increased by 200%.

active.desc: Swing your Greatsword down on your target for massive damage. Gain a stack of Chaos Fury, increasing your Crit Chance and Crit Damage by 15% for 12 seconds, stacks to 4. Deals double damage to Branded targets. Recovers 60 mana on hit.
Impale your target with your Greatsword to drain life from them. Chaorrupt your target's defenses, increasing the damage they take by 10% for 15 seconds, stacks to 4.

Chaos manifests itself, dealing damage while randomly reducing your target's Dodge, Crit Chance, Hit Chance, Haste, and outgoing damage. Each debuff reduces its respective stat by 30% for 20 seconds. Also applies Focus for 4 seconds, which forces your target to attack only you for the duration. Can’t miss and always crits.

Chaorrupt the raw energy around you and release a portion of it at your target, dealing damage while absorbing the remainder into your armor. Gain Chaotic Armor, healing you over time and granting you 60% defense for 15 seconds.

Deals damage and channels your fury into your greatsword. Gain Unstoppable Force, increasing your haste by 25% for 35 seconds. If your opponent is Ravaged, gain Fury Unleashed, increasing your outgoing damage by 50% for 10 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Chaos Shaper.sDesc: Chaos Shapers possess an influence over the metaphysical axis by which the world revolves. By tilting it in their favor, they create entropy.
aMRM: Chaos Shapers reform mana from the air around them during strikes, recovering 10 mana with each Chaotic Touch, and recovering all their mana when they Realign.

passive.desc: 50% Critical Damage
35% Physical Resistance
The universe watches you closely. +10% luck.

active.desc: Enshroud yourself in chaos and strike the foe.

Skew the axis of the present space, shattering the balance and evoking the power of either Chaos or Unity, generating Entropy. The axis tilts in your favor, granting you 12% increased magical and physical damage each time you generate Entropy, up to 8 times, and lasting 8 seconds.

Manipulate the surrounding energies into your favor, and cripple your opponents. If you’re empowered by Chaos, consume it and create Disarray in your opponent, decreasing their damage dealt, Dodge, and Crit Chance by 20%. If you’re empowered by Unity, consume it and inflict Paresis upon your foe, increasing the damage they take by 20%. Both effects stack to 3 and last 20 seconds.

Weave the present energies into powers in your favor, and greatly increase your combat capabilities. If you’re empowered by Chaos, consume it and gain Consonance, increasing your damage dealt by 20%. If you’re empowered by Unity, Coadunate your form, healing you over time. Both effects stack to 3, and last 20 seconds.

Forcefully realign the axis of the present space, dealing more damage the more Entropy is present, and consuming it. The realignment rids you and your opponent of your Disarray, Paresis, Coadunation, and Consonance. The space sways in your favor, increasing your Crit Chance by 20% and Crit Damage by 100% for 23 seconds.  Always crits and cannot be avoided.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

aMRM: Chaos Slayers gain mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on crits.  The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total.

passive.desc: Endurance increased by 25%.
Chaos, the power within, consumes you, boosting your Outgoing Damage by 10%!

Magical Resistance increased by 35%. While facing Chaos monsters, Engima applies Absolute Chaos, increasing all stats by 13%, preventing Courageous from applying, and causing your other random effects to always apply.

active.desc: Use your newfound powers to enchant your weapon with pure Chaos and strike at your foes. If you are not Chaorrupted, you apply Chaos Affliction, increasing your outgoing damage by 1% for 12 seconds, stacks to 30. If you are Chaorrupted, applies Chaos Blight, increasing your outgoing damage by 6% for 12 seconds, stacks to 15.

Let the Chaorruption take over and render your physical form. Deals damage and applies Chaorrupted, increasing your Crit Chance and Hit Chance by 10% while removing all of your skills' area of effect for 15 seconds.

Chaos is the unpredictable power shrouded in mystery. Deals no damage and randomly applies up to 4 effects. 

Anguished: +50% damage taken (40%)
Delusion: -40% Hit Chance (40%)
Impasse: -40% Dodge (40%)
Courageous: -40% Outgoing Damage to self (8%)

Effects last 10 seconds.

Absorb the chaotic energy around you to mend your wounds, applying an HoT for 6 seconds. The absorbed energy also has a 50% chance to form a barrier around you, reducing incoming damage by 65% for 8 seconds.

Create even more Chaos with a massive explosion, applying additional effects based on the active effects that were applied from Enigma. 

Anguished -> Atrophy: -50% outgoing damage
Delusion -> Ataxia: -40% Crit Chance
Impasse -> Numbing: -40% Haste
Courageous -> Paragon: -500% Damage Resistance to self

Effects last 10 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Chrono DataKnight.sDesc: Chrono Dragonknights combine ancient Draconian magic and Chronomancy to rip deadly rifts in time.
aMRM: Chrono DragonKnights gain mana when they:
* Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
* Are struck by an enemy in combat

passive.desc: Wisdom and Intellect increased by 10%
Dodge Chance increased by 15%

active.desc: Deals physical damage based on your spell power and has additional effects based on what spells have been cast.
Deals light damage to the target and applies Temporal Rift to the caster, stacking up to 4 times and giving effects to your other abilities. Lasts 30 seconds unless restacked.
Deals damage based on Temporal Rift stacks. Must have 1 stack of Temporal Rift applied but does not consume stacks. You also gain Chrono Dragon's Skin for 10 seconds, reducing damage taken by 30%.

Applies Flammable to the enemy increasing magic damage taken by 15% for 15 seconds. Your auto attacks on enemies with Flammable applied causes Dragon's Fire DoT that stacks up to 10 times. Lasts 15 seconds unless restacked.

If Temporal Rift is active, deal damage to your target based on the amount you've dealt in up to the past 10 seconds while it was active. Damage scales with each stack of Temporal Rift and consumes those stacks.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Chrono ShadowHunter.sDesc: The beasts lurking in the shadows can not be allowed a foothold in any place or time. Thanks to the Chrono Shadowslayers, dark forests and bloodthirsty creatures are excised from history.
aMRM: Chrono ShadowSlayers load and fire special ammunition with their firearms.

passive.desc: Your high-tech parts allow you to shoot faster and more powerful shots for +10% damage.
You pinpoint critical weaknesses with ease, granting you +10% Crit Chance.
+20% Luck.

active.desc: Fire as fast as you can pull the trigger! Your shots are so fast that they're unavoidable. Your cylinder holds 6 shots, needing to be reloaded when empty.

Load 6 shots into your revolver and refill your mana. Removes Tracer rounds and FMJ rounds.

If you have 4 or more stacks of Temporal Rift, consume them and enter Gunslinger Stance for 2 seconds, granting you free shots and generating Chaos Rifts, which block Temporal Rift and increase your Crit Damage by 20% per stack for 10 seconds.

Load Tracers and fire one, increasing your Defense by 20% and Dodge by 40% until you reload. Gain a Temporal Rift, stacking to 4 and lasting 10 seconds, and a HoT for 4 seconds based on max health. Replaces FMJ rounds.

Firing with Tracer rounds Paints your opponent, reducing their damage, Dodge, and Crit Chance by 6% per stack, up to 4 stacks, for 16 seconds.

Load Full Metal Jackets and fire an empowered shot, dealing additional damage and increasing your Physical Damage by 25% until you reload. Gain a Temporal Rift, stacking to 4 and lasting 10 seconds. Replaces Tracer rounds.

Firing with FMJ rounds shreds your opponent's defense by 6% per stack, up to 6 stacks, for 12 seconds.

Fire a silver bullet, dealing powerful damage based on how much damage was dealt in the last 10 seconds while a Rift was present. Empties your rounds and Blinds your target, reducing their Hit Chance by 50% for 1 second.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Classic Defender.sDesc: Defenders are stoic, intensely loyal fighters. They attempt to control fights through sheer determination.
aMRM: Defenders gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Are struck by an enemy in combat

passive.desc: Critical strike chance increased 10%
Endurance increased 15%

active.desc: A basic attack, taught to all adventurers. Damage dealt is based on your weapon damage.
Deals moderate damage and forces the target to turn its attention to you for 6 seconds.
Strikes up to two targets in melee range, dealing light damage. Also applies Crushed, reducing the target's outgoing damage by 15% and increasing incoming damage by 10%. Lasts 10 seconds.
Deals massive damage to your target.
Heals a friendly target for a small amount. Also applies Safeguard, absorbing all incoming damage up to an amount based on Attack Power. Lasts 8 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Classic Ninja.sDesc: Ninjas operate in silence secrecy. They are capable fighters, but prefer to attack quickly and decisively, eliminating the threat of resistance.
aMRM: Ninjas gain mana when they:
-Land the first strike in combat
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Cast "Shadowburn" on a target without "Shadowblade"

passive.desc: Dodge increased by 15%.
Hit Chance increased by 10% and Crit Chance increased by 15%.

active.desc: A rapid attack studied only by a reclusive few. Damage dealt is based on weapon damage.
Instantly attack twice, dealing extra damage.
Deals physical and magical damage, and dramatically reduces their hit chance 6 seconds.
Deals light weapon damage plus magical damage, stunning any target afflicted by Shadowblade for 3s, or returning 20 mana otherwise.
Increases Dodge and Haste by 5% every time you are hit. Lasts 30 seconds and can't be refreshed.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Classic Pirate.sDesc: Rogues are quick-moving, deadly fighters. They prey on any weakness in their opponent, while using poisons and evasive footwork to their advantage.
aMRM: Rogues gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Dodge any attack (restores HP as well)

passive.desc: Dodge increased by 15%.
Hit Chance increased by 10% and Crit Chance increased by 15%.

active.desc: Double click a monster to start Auto Attacking it. This is a very unique attack that deals rapid, consistent damage based on your attack power instead of your weapon damage.
Instantly deals weapon damage and applies Viper's Kiss, a poison dealing additional damage over 7 seconds.
Increases your Haste and Dodge by 30% for 7 seconds.

Deals moderate damage and applies Concealed Blade for 7 seconds, causing your attacks to deal bonus damage to targets below 40% of their max HP, with the bonus damage increasing the closer they are to death.
Deals more damage the closer Viper's Kiss is to expiring.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Dark Master of Moglins.sDesc: Recommended Enhancement: Wizard. Thank you for your contribution to the 2018 Moglin Kickstarter! You have earned your place as a Master of Moglins and can now call on them to assist you and your allies in battle!
aMRM: Master of Moglins gain mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on critical hits.  The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total.

passive.desc: Healing Power increased by 15%.
INT and DoT Power increased by 10%.
Moglin Frenzy applies Moglin Blitz to your target, increasing the damage they take from each successive hit of the skill by 45%, up to 12 times.

active.desc: A masterful spell that has been passed down by Moglins. Deals damage based on your spell power.

You burst with Moglin spirit! Deals damage and applies buffs to you for each target hit, in the following order:

Pirate: +30% Haste
Frogzard: +80% Hit Chance
Quibble: +10% Luck
Paladin: +20% Damage Resistance
Dricken: +20% outgoing damage

Effects last 20 seconds.

The Dark Moglin Arts have been unleashed! Randomly applies up to 4 different evil Moglin Auras for each target hit. 

Zorbak: DoT (50%, doesn't stack)
Legion: +5% outgoing damage, stacks to 7 (80%)
Mort: +7% Dodge, stacks to 7 (80%)
Memet: +20% Crit Chance (50%)

Effects last 20 seconds.

Your Moglins heal you and up to 6 allies, then apply buffs in the following order: 

Twilly: +20% Endurance for you and all allies
Twig: HoT for you and all allies
Cupcake: Regenerates your mana over time (10 every 2 seconds)

Effects last 20 seconds.

If used out of combat, while you don't already have a pet equipped, will summon Twilly.

You and your Moglins unleash an all out attack! Deals damage and applies debuffs based on your active buffs.

Pirate: -20% Haste
Frogzard: -20% Hit Chance
Quibble: -20% Crit Chance
Paladin: -20% Damage Resistance
Dricken: -20% outgoing damage
Zorbak: Additional Spell Power DoT
Legion: -20% Damage Resistance
Mort: -50% Dodge
Memet: 2 second stun
Twilly: -20% outgoing damage
Twig: 4 second Decay
Cupcake: +20% Mana Costs

Effects last 10 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

aMRM: DeathKnight Lords gain mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on critical hits.  The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total.

passive.desc: Damage Resistance increased by 20%.
Hit Chance and DoT Power increased by 20%.
Strength increased by 20%. Your skills have a 13% chance per target hit to apply Calcium Rush, increasing your Haste by 30% for 12 seconds.

active.desc: Throw your blade forward, dealing damage based on your Attack Power and Bone Gathered stacks.

Harvest the bones of your enemies. Applies Bone Harvested to your target, a DoT that reduces Dodge by 15%, and Bone Gathered to yourself, increasing the damage of your skills. Effects last 16 seconds and stack to 10.

Curse up to 3 foes with the burden of Grimskull, dealing damage based on Bone Gathered stacks. Applies Cursed for 10 seconds, a DoT that reduces Damage Resistance by 20%, plus an additional 3% for each stack of Bone Harvested.

Strike with your Bone Gauntlet, dealing damage based on Bone Gathered stacks. Applies Deathgrasp for 15 seconds, a DoT that reduces Outgoing Damage by 20%, plus an additional 3% for each stack of Bone Harvested. Also applies Focus for 4 seconds, forcing your targets to attack only you for the duration.

You tap into the power of Death to pull your form back together, healing you based on your Bone Gathered stacks. Applies Cerement for 15 seconds, increasing your Damage Resistance by 30%, plus an additional 5% for each stack of Bone Gathered you have while removing those stacks.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

DoomKnight.sDesc: Doom Knights are malevolent, dark warriors. They are violent, quite durable, and prefer to work alone.
aMRM: Doom Knights gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Are struck by an enemy in combat

passive.desc: You deal 15% additional damage with physical attacks.
Damage taken reduced by 15%.
chance to do big damage

active.desc: A basic attack, taught to all adventurers. Damage dealt is based on your weapon damage.

A quick attack that deals a small amount of damage but then applies Dark Wound on the target, dealing 200% of weapon DPS over 8 seconds. Stacks up to 5 times and heals you for twice the damage dealt at maximum stacks. Also applies Cracked Soul, which increases the target's damage taken by 10% for 8 seconds and stacks 5 times.

A quick attack dealing physical and magical damage, improved by the number of Dark Wound stacks on the target. Applies either Feared or Despaired. Feared reduces the target's dodge by 50% and Despaired reduces their crit rate by 50%. Always hits but can't crit.
A strong attack which deals weapon damage plus additional damage increased the closer you are to death.

If Dark Wound is on the target, the caster will take additional damage per attack for 10 seconds, but will add some of the amount taken to their next autoattack. Otherwise, applies a 3 second stun. Also increases player haste and crit chance by 20% if Dark Wound is on the target. Consumes 20% of max hp.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Dragon of Time.sDesc: An evanescent fragment of your original self, captured by fate, you retain some influence over the tides of time. Torn by war, corrupted by Chaos, and reborn anew to walk Lore once more.
aMRM: You gain mana whenever an enemy takes damage from one of your skills.

passive.desc: Starting at rank 1, when Convergence is active, using your abilities will grant you the aspects of Linearity, Continuity, and Causality, increasing your Endurance by 75% each, for 9 seconds. When Convergence is not active, you create Discordance, increasing your DoT damage by 25%, up to 10 stacks, for 9 seconds.
You split your life to preside over the providence of the many, reducing your base Endurance by 40%, and increasing your Haste by 15%.
Hit Chance increased by 15%. At the pinnacle of your power, using your abilities wears away at your foes' existential resilience, weakening them.

active.desc: Strike at your opponents' being with your force of will, Rending them for Damage over Time, stacking to 5 and lasting 10 seconds. Cannot crit.

Violently tear through the boundaries between timelines, sacrificing 10% of your health per target hit to Converge your successive strikes on a single target, removing all of your skills’ area of effect, increasing your Magical Damage by 100%, and decreasing your mana costs by 60%. Further Rends all targets hit, and cannot crit.

Strike your opponent for noncrit damage, and Rend them while pulling your corporeal form back together, healing you for half of your missing health. If your strikes are Converged, you gain Coalescence for 5 seconds, an additional small HoT.

Breathe temporal fire over the battlefield, burning away you and your foes’ fates, removing your Convergence and burning you for 10% of your health per target hit. The most intense flames affect your primary target, searing their timeline and increasing the DoT damage they take by 150% for 7 seconds. Their destiny remains alight for the duration, burning them for a powerful DoT. Cannot be avoided, but cannot crit.
Lash out with the force of your vitality, dealing heavy damage based on your current health while further Rending them. Cannot crit.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Drakkar Knight.sDesc: The Dragon Knight is a master swordsman. They embraces melee combat where they shines most, controlling their opponent with a combination of swordplay and a heavily enchanted blade. A Dragon Knight has mastered the manipulation of Dragons Fire and favors fire based enchantments and spells.
aMRM: A Dragon Knight gains mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on crits.  The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total.

passive.desc: Magical Resistance increased by 20%.
INT increased by 16% and Hit Chance increased by 20%.
Haste increased by 15% and Crit Chance increased by 20%.

active.desc: Deals physical damage based on your spell power and has additional effects based on what spells have been cast.

Strike your foe with a blade infused with dragonfire, dealing unavoidable damage and making your foe Flammable, reducing their Magical Resistance by 30% and DoT Resistance by 50% for 15 seconds. During this time, Spell Blade will set your foe on fire, burning them over time for 15 seconds, stacking to 3. Replaces Dumbfounded.

Strike with the might of a dragon, dealing unavoidable damage and Dumbfounding your foe for 15 seconds, reducing their Physical Damage and Crit Chance by 25%. During this time, Spell Blade has a 20% chance to stun your foe for 2 seconds. Replaces Flammable.

The first time this skill is used in combat, you disarm your foe, reducing their outgoing damage by 80% for 4 seconds.

Strike precisely at your foe, dealing unavoidable damage and applying Swordplay, increasing your Damage Resistance by 40% for 18 seconds. If your foe is Dumbfounded, your attack is particularly effective, granting you Masterful, increasing your Outgoing Damage and Dodge by 10% for 18 seconds, stacking to 3.
Conjure the power of a dragon’s breath, burning your foe for unavoidable damage. If your foe is Flammable, gain a stack of Blazing Siphon, an HoT, lasting 18 seconds and stacking to 3.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

aMRM: Eternal Chronomancers gain mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on critical hits.  The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total.

passive.desc: Hit chance increased by 25%
Haste increased by 15%
Critical strike chance increased by 15%.

active.desc: Deals damage based on your weapon damage.

Strike your opponent with the unavoidable ebb of time, damaging them and reducing their Dodge by 25% for 5 seconds, and gaining a stack of Deadlock. Using this skill while you have 8 stacks of Deadlock consumes them to Enter Infinity, increasing your Crit Chance by 20% for 3 seconds.

Strike your opponent with the unavoidable flow of time, damaging them and gaining a stack of Temporal Rift and Deadlock. Using this skill while you have 8 stacks of Deadlock consumes them to enter The Fourth Dimension, increasing physical damage dealt by 20% for 3 seconds.

If Temporal Rift is present, deal damage to your target based on the amount you've dealt in up to the past 10 seconds while it was active. Damage scales with each stack of Temporal Rift and consumes those stacks.

Shift the present timeline in your favor, gaining Taking Eternity, reducing your damage taken by 30%, and increasing your damage dealt and critical damage by 20% for 15 seconds. If Temporal Rift is present, you heal for 10 seconds based on the number of stacks you have.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Eternal Inversionist.sDesc: You should see their sand bottle art!
aMRM: Eternal Inversionists gain mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on crits.  The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total.

passive.desc: Increases haste by 15%
Increases STR and END by 12%
Reduces incoming spell damage by 40%.

active.desc: Swing your weapon through space and time, striking your opponent from any distance. Has a 25% chance to apply Rejuvenation, an HoT for 8 seconds.
Rip the dimensional fabric and attempt to partially invert your opponents, twisting their reality and reducing their outgoing damage for 15 seconds.
Cast ancient bandages at your opponent's, causing them to rapidly age. Increases the damage your opponent takes by 25%, reduces their Hit Chance by 25%, and applies a DoT for 8 seconds.
Smash the ground and create a 4th dimensional shockwave, trapping your opponent in the ebb and flow of time. Applies Warped, reducing up to 6 opponents' haste by 30% for 15 seconds.
Summon twisted copies of yourself throughout time to attack multiple enemies for huge damage. and has a 25% chance to apply Shock of Consciousness stunning enemies for 4 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Exalted Soul Cleaver.sDesc: Recommended enhancement: Luck. For the Legion at any cost! Your task is to harness the souls of the enemies of the legion. Break, leech, rend and snare their will to live. Lose yourself to the power, lose yourself to the legion!
aMRM: Exalted Harbingers gain mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on crits.  The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total. The lower your health the more you will get.

passive.desc: All damage taken increased by 15%.
You deal 15% more damage with all attacks.
Your faith in the legion empowers you. Increases Endurance by 50%.

active.desc: You relentlessly beat at your foe's soul. Dealing high damage based on weapon attack, but with a longer cooldown.

Rend your foe for unavoidable damage based on the difference between your current and maximum HP, dealing more damage the lower your health is. Your strike leaves them rent, decreasing Crit Chance by 30%.
Drain life directly from your target's soul, dealing damage and healing you.
Enter a Soul Pact, reducing your incoming healing by 50% but increasing your defense by 50% for 30 seconds.

Sacrifice your very life force to increase all damage dealt by 125% Crit Chance by 15%, and Haste by 8% for 10 seconds. Each sacrifice you make increases your Crit Damage by 20% for 10 seconds as well, does not refresh.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

FrostBlood Titan.sDesc: There is power in blood. Coming from a long line of titans, your blood is especially potent. You have mastered the ability of calling on the power running through your veins to bring devastation to your foes.
aMRM: Blood Titans don't use mana. They instead channel their life force into their abilities.

passive.desc: Damage taken reduced by 80%.
Endurance increased by 300%, but your increased size reduces your Dodge by 50%.

Starting at rank 1, all skills can't miss and can't crit. Additionally, all skills (except Gilded Crusher) heal you for 20% of your max health (before modifiers) over 1 second. At rank 10, Gilded Crusher applies Life Drinker, which heals you for 5% of your max HP (before modifiers) every 2 seconds.

active.desc: Strike your target with the full might of your battleaxe. Damage dealt is based on your current health.

Slam your battleaxe into the ground, knocking your target off balance. Deals damage and applies Crippling Smash, reducing your target's outgoing damage by 60% and Crit Chance by 30% for 8 seconds. Also has a 25% chance to stun your target for 1 second. Costs 20% of your max HP.

Thrust your battleaxe forward, eviscerating your target. Deals damage and applies Titan's Fury, increasing your Haste by 20%. Also applies Disemboweled, increasing your target's damage taken by 30%. Both effects last 15 seconds. Costs 20% of your max HP.

Challenge a worthy opponent so that your legend may spread! Deals damage and applies Focus for 4 seconds, which forces your target to attack only you for the duration. Also applies Titan's Curse, drastically increasing your target's Crit Chance but reducing their Crit Damage by 300% for 2 seconds. Costs 10% of your max HP.

Perform the ancient rite of the Blood Titans. Deals massive damage and applies Blood Rage, increasing your outgoing physical damage by 100%, but reducing your Heal Power by 50% for 5 seconds. Costs 30% of your max HP.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Frostval Barbarian.sDesc: During Frostval these nomadic wanderers from the north travel from town to town giving gifts and protecting those in need. You don't want to be on their naughty list though, else be on the receiving end of their most infamous gift - their pure rage.
aMRM: Frostval Barbarians gain mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on critical hits.  The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total.

passive.desc: Reduces damage taken by 15%
Increases haste by 50%
Increases Strength by 20%

active.desc: Swing your poleaxe at your target, dealing unavoidable damage that can't crit. If Enrage is active, has a 25% chance to stun your target for 1 second.
Depress your foe with a wintry blast, dealing unavoidable damage that can't crit and applying Winter's Depress, reducing your target's  Haste by 20% for 10 seconds, stacks to 4.

Your allies are on the nice list, that means presents! Applies Frostval Gifts to you and your allies, a 10 second HoT. If you're Enraged, applies Frozen Beard to yourself instead of Frostval Gifts, increasing Damage Resistance by 30% for 10 seconds.

Cast a wintry spell, restoring 20 mana for yourself and applying Silver Thaw, Silver Maw, and Silver Jaw to you and your allies. Silver Thaw reduces mana costs by 15%, Silver Maw increases Crit Chance by 10%, and Silver Jaw increases Crit Damage by 20%. Effects last 10 seconds and stack to 4.

Your foes are on the naughty list, that means a beating! Deals unavoidable damage that can't crit and applies Enrage for 5 seconds, increasing your outgoing damage by 50% and removing Frostval Gifts from yourself.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Great Thief.sDesc: Heromart always needs new things to sell, and the BEST way is to send an artifact hunter out to find more gear! (This is non-refundable!)
aMRM: Great Thieves regain mana when striking an enemy. They restore HP and Mana when dodging.

passive.desc: Increase Luck by 20%
Increases dodge chance by 20%.
Starting at rank 1, your autos have a 10% chance to apply a 150% physical damage buff for 4 seconds. At rank 10, Hidden Blade permanently increases your dodge by 18%.

active.desc: A rapid attack studied only by a reclusive few. You also carry a hidden blade and strike when your foe least expects it, dealing additional damage.

Reach into your deceptively large bag of stolen artifacts and use one of their abilities to aid you in battle. Each treasure causes a different effect, so use their powers wisely! Each aura debuffs them by 35% of the shown effect.
Slip into the shadows to avoid detection from your foes. Applies Stealth Increasing Dodge and Hit Chance by 35% for 15 seconds.

Flip a magically enchanted coin and call it heads or tails. Applies heads, a large HoT over 12 seconds or Tails, returning around half your mana. (the mana regain indicator is represented by a 0 damage heal over time)

Attack your foe when they least expect it, dealing huge damage. If Stealth is active, stuns your opponent for 4 seconds. If Hidden Blade is active, causes them to bleed out dealing damage over 8 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Guardian.sDesc: Becoming a Guardian of Battleon means that you have access to the power of the Guardian armaments, and you can invoke the awesome power of the Guardian Dragon. If you train enough, you could be granted access to the UltraGuardian plate, forged through the combined efforts of Yulgar and Adder.
aMRM: Guardians gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Are struck by an enemy in combat

passive.desc: Your class has an offensive lean. Your attacks deal +25% damage. However, you take +25% damage from attacks.
Your Guardian training grants you +250% Endurance.
Your Mastercrafted armor grants you an additional 5% haste.

active.desc: Strike your opponent with your Guardian Blade, dealing high damage and imbuing your weapon with an element, granting you the Earth, Ice, Water, or Light for 4 seconds.

Invoke a spell healing you and 6 allies, turning elements generated by your other skills into buffs for yourself. Gain a stack of Guardian Spirit per target healed, up to 20 stacks, for 8 seconds. Cannot crit.
Earth: 20s HoT
Ice: -30% Phys, Mag, and DoT taken for 20s
Water: Mana Heal
Light: +35% Phys and Mag damage for 10s
Fire: +25% damage and Crit Chance for 10s
Energy: +50% Crit Chance, Hit Chance, and Crit Damage for 3s
Wind: +15% Haste for 15s
Darkness: +30% Defence for 15s

Strike a powerful blow with your Guardian Blade, dealing high damage and imbuing your weapon with an element, granting you Fire, Energy, Wind, or Darkness for 4 seconds. Additionally, gain 1 stack of Guardian Spirit.
Invoke the Essence Orb, trading your blood for power. Gain 25 mana and 2 stacks of Guardian Spirit.

Call upon the awesome power of the Guardian Dragon to raze the battlefield, dealing incredible damage based on your stacks of Guardian Spirit. The intense heat melts you and your opponent's armor, reducing defense by 25% for 10 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Hollowborn Vindicator.sDesc: In another time and space, the Hero became the Hollowborn Vindicator, the last stand against a Celestial deity. If Shadows linger after the end, that means there's still enough light to cast them.
aMRM: The Hollowborn Vindicator doesn't use mana. Their power derives from being on the brink of death.

passive.desc: Hit Chance increased by 15%.
Endurance increased by 150%.
Crit Chance increased by 15%.

active.desc: A standard attack used by Dawn Vindicators to eradicate monsters. Deals damage based on your Spell Power while applying Reformation, reducing your target's Crit Chance and Dodge by 20% for 30 seconds.

Punish those who deliver harm upon you, dealing increased damage the lower your health is and healing you for a portion of the damage dealt. Applies Hollow Reckoning, reducing your target's Damage Resistance by 6% for 10 seconds, stacking to 10. 

Also applies one stack of Grace Stolen for 10 seconds to your target, stacking to 10, and applies an extra stack if you're Decayed.

Siphon Grace from your opponent, consuming Grace Stolen and healing you based on the number of stacks. You gain Graceful, increasing Damage Resistance by 25% for 20 seconds and removing Decay if it's active. Can't miss.

Purge the evil from this realm, dealing damage based on your target's Grace Stolen stacks. If you're not Decayed, applies Divine Decree to your target, reducing their outgoing damage by 60% for 8 seconds. Can't miss.

Call out to the Shadow Fiend to become Hollow for 15 seconds, increasing your Outgoing Damage by 100%, Crit Chance by 40%, and Haste by 10%. Shield yourself from death, applying Safeguard for 6 seconds whichs blocks up to 2,500 damage. Also applies Decay for 4 seconds, negating all non lifesteal healing you receive and preventing Safeguard from applying. Costs 50% of your max HP.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Infinity Titan.sDesc: Channel the power of the universe itself to save it and your allies.
aMRM: Infinity Titans gain mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on crits.  The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total.

passive.desc: Increases haste by 20%
Endurance increased by 20%.

active.desc: Strike your opponent with the might of your gauntlet.

Impale your opponent, dealing damage and accelerating their life, making them frail. Applies Aged to the target, increasing all incoming damage by 8% for 8 seconds. Stacks to 5. Has a 25% chance to apply Anima for 2 seconds, increasing your outgoing magical damage by 275%. If Anima is applied, immediately has a 50% chance to stun for 4 seconds.

Harness the energy of the universe and beyond. Applies Spacial Acceleration and Universal Power to you and up to 6 of your servants, increasing Haste and Crit Chance by 30% for 10 seconds while improving mana regeneration. Has a 25% chance to apply Anima for 2 seconds, increasing your outgoing magical damage by 275%. If Anima is applied, mana costs are immediately reduced for you and your servants by 20% for 10 seconds.

Use your kinetic powers to apply a psionic barrier to you and up to 6 of your servants, increasing Damage Resisance by 50% and applies a small HoT for 4 seconds. Has a 25% chance to apply Anima for 2 seconds, increasing your outgoing magical damage by 275%. If Anima is applied, immediately increases your Damage Resistance by 80% while doubling your HoT for 4 seconds.

Warp the reality around your opponent, dealing massive damage. Also applies Decaying Matter, a DoT that grows stronger with each attack that hits your opponent for 30 seconds. Has a 25% chance to apply Anima for 2 seconds, increasing your outgoing magical damage by 275%. If Anima is applied, the target becomes warped, reducing crit chance and haste by 40% for 8 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Interstellar Knight.sDesc: Protect Lore as you fight throughout all of space and time. Bestowing your opponent, converging time around them to devastate your foes!
aMRM: Infinity Knights gain mana whenever an enemy takes damage from one of its damage over time effects.

passive.desc: Increases Hit Chance by 75% and decreases Crit Chance by 15%
Increases Endurance by 75%
Increases HoT and DoT power by 30%.

active.desc: Ages your opponent with every successive hit, applying Perpetual Rend, a 6 second DoT that stacks to 6 and decreases your opponent’s dodge by 20%.

Strike with a power that illuminates your foe with the purifying light of dawn, shredding them for rapid damage over time with a Temporal Shift, and empowering yourself with a Temporal Rift. Both effects last 30 seconds, stack to 6, and strengthen your other abilities.

Constrict time at the present junction, and invoke a Veil of Compressed Time to protect you for 10 seconds, decreasing the damage and DoT damage you take by 40%, and increasing your Haste by 15%. In the presence of a Temporal Rift, the Daybreak Radiance heals you, applying a 10 second HoT based on its stacks. If your opponent is unaffected by a Temporal Shift, they become trapped in Twilight Shadows, taking rapid damage over time for 12 seconds.
Scorch your foe with radiant chronolight, dealing a massive DoT for 10 seconds based on the number of Temporal Shift stacks they have, and consuming both it and Temporal Rift.

Warp space and time around your foe to inflict unavoidable damage. If your foe is affected by Temporal Shift, they become trapped in the Prior Dawn for 12 seconds, increasing their DoT damage taken by 30% and decreasing damage dealt by 10%. If your foe is unaffected by Temporal Shift, they become trapped in the Subsequent Dusk for 12 seconds, increasing their DoT damage taken by 60%, and decreasing damage dealt by 20%.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

King's Echo.sDesc: A memory of the man who became a legend of Hope. The people called upon a King to lead them, and that man was none other than Alden Alteon.
aMRM: The King's Echo fully restores their mana upon summoning Corvak.

passive.desc: Endurance increased by 200% and Physical Resistance increased by 20%.
Haste and Crit Chance increased by 25%.
Mana Costs reduced by 20% and Hit Chance, Outgoing Magic Damage, and Healing Power increased by 10%.

active.desc: The King's blade, its magical properties allow it to store and unleash energy. Damage dealt is based on Spell Power and Energy Infusion.

The mace that liberated the weak from their oppressors. Deals damage based on your Spell Power and applies Censure, reducing your target's Damage Resistance, Crit Chance, and Dodge by 20% for 10 seconds. 

While Royal Resolve is active, applies Overthrown, reducing your target's outgoing damage by 8% for 10 seconds, stacks to 4.
Channel a bolt of electricity through your sword, leaving behind Residual Energy which stacks to 8 and lasts 10 seconds.

Create a damage nullifying barrier, guarding against most forms of damage for 2 seconds and applying Focus for 4 seconds, which forces your target to attack only you for the duration. These effects can not occur again until CORVAK! is used. Also applies Royal Resolve, increasing your Damage Resistance by 50% while healing you over time for 6 seconds.

Call upon your dragon to unleash a powerful energy blast, dealing unavoidable critical damage based on your missing mana and refilling it. The blast Infuses all Residual Energy into your Dragon Sword for 20 seconds, increasing its damage based on the number of stacks and replacing any stacks that are currently Infused.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Legendary Hero.sDesc: You are truly one of Lore's greatest heroes! Because of your support and efforts in battle, the world will be saved!
aMRM: Legendary Heroes gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Are struck by an enemy in combat

passive.desc: Reduces all damage taken by 15%.
Increases Damage and Haste by 15%
The power of a true hero invigorates you and your allies when you use Legacy Crater, increasing your Strength, Intellect, and Luck by 40% for 6 seconds.

active.desc: A basic attack, taught to all adventurers. Damage dealt is based on your weapon damage.
Attack your target and defend yourself, reducing the damage you take by 8%, stacking to 4 and lasting 8 seconds.

Inspire your allies, healing you and up to 6 allies for a small amount and increasing Hit Chance by 10% and Damage by 25% for 12 seconds. You grant them all a stack of Legendary, increasing their Crit Damage by 5%, stacking to 8 and lasting 15 seconds.
Strike your opponent and cripple them, decreasing their Crit Chance, Damage, and Haste by 15% for 15 seconds. All allies who strike them during this time gain extra mana.
Convert you and all of your allies’ Legendary Stacks to incredible amounts of healing, giving them an HoT for 6 seconds based on the number of stacks they have.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Legion Revenant.sDesc: Recommended enhancement: Wizard. Steeped in caliginous darkness, Dark Revenants derive their power from the very essence responsible for the Legion’s un-death. The Legion flows through them, and they are the Legion.
aMRM: Legion Revenant regain mana from all hits landed in combat, more if it's a critical strike. The amount of mana regained is based on the amount of damage done relative to their own HP total.

passive.desc: Increases wisdom by 20%
Increases outgoing magic damage by 40%
Atramentous Shade, Wicked Purgatory, and Anathema have a 50% chance to increase your target's incoming damage by 7% for 30 seconds, stacks to 15.

active.desc: A sinister spell of powerful dark energy. Deals moderate damage to one target and light damage to two additional targets. Recovers 15 mana on hit.

Summon a malicious pitch black fog, applying Decay for 2 seconds. The darkness traps your enemy, decreasing their Dodge by 25% while damaging them over time for 12 seconds. Always crits and can’t miss.

Conjure otherworldly flames to sear your opponents for moderate damage, reducing their Crit Chance by 15%, plus an additional 3% per stack (up to 30% total). The flames protect you, decreasing your incoming damage by 20%, plus an additional 4% per stack (up to 40% total). Both effects last 12 seconds.

Touch the darkness within yourself and your allies by drawing out their twisted inclinations, increasing their Dodge, Crit Chance, and outgoing damage by 30% for 12 seconds. Immorality strengthens your magic, increasing your Haste by 10%, Crit Damage by 30%, and applying a strong heal over time effect and mana shield for 12 seconds.
Focus all your energy and unleash a massive burst of dark magic, dealing high damage.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Lich.sDesc: Only in death can you truly embrace the darkness that lies within you. Channel it to raise an army of the dead and lead an assault across Lore. The darkest power is now yours!
aMRM: Liches gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Are struck by an enemy in combat
-Use Vital Sacrifice (restores 20 mana)

passive.desc: Damage Resistance and DoT Resistance increased by 30%.
Haste increased by 30% and Hit Chance increased by 20%.
Upon taking lethal damage, negate that instance of damage and apply Survived Death, fully restoring your health and mana. This effect can only occur once every 45 seconds.

active.desc: Unleash a miasma of death, dealing physical damage based on your Spell Power. Applies Death Blight to Humans, an 8 second DoT that stacks to 25.
Attack alongside your army. Deals double damage if Ex Mortis is active.

Leech life from your target, dealing damage based on Attack Power while healing you. Applies Withered for 8 seconds, reducing your target's outgoing damage by 40% and Crit Chance and Dodge by 20%. If Ex Mortis is active, applies Necrotic Curse for 8 seconds, reducing your target's Magic Resistance by 40%, and Decay for 2 seconds, negating all non lifesteal healing received.

Convert your life force into energy, damaging yourself based on Attack Power and restoring 20 mana. If Ex Mortis is active, applies Necrotic Edge, increasing your Crit Chance by 20% and reducing mana costs by 25% for 10 seconds.

Summons an army of undead minions to your side (only appears if summoned outside of combat). Applies Deathly Frenzy, increasing your outgoing damage by 150% for 10 seconds. You conjure your darkest magic, applying Ex Mortis which empowers the next skill you use.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

LightCaster.sDesc: The Order of the LightCasters formed to support the Champion of Light, and need every mage available to fight the battle against Chaos!
aMRM: LightCasters gain mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on crits.  The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total.

passive.desc: Increases Intellect by 15%
Increases Haste by 15%
Increases all damage done by 15%

active.desc: A basic attack, taught to all adventurers. Damage dealt is based on your weapon damage.

Cast down an elemental light beacon upon the target. Does light damage and applies In The Spotlight increasing the amount of damage your opponent takes by 3% per stack and lasts 10 seconds if not restacked. (Stacks up to 50 times)

Blasts your opponent with a ball of pure light. Deals significant damage that is guaranteed to hit but cannot crit. Each hit applies a stack of Blinded by Light which decreases your opponent's chance to hit by 5% per stack and lasts 12 seconds if not restacked. Maxes out at 5 stacks.

Casts a net of light upon your allies. Heals yourself and up to 6 allies and applies Illuminated, increasing outgoing damage, Crit Chance, Crit Damage, Hit Chance, Dodge, Haste and Damage Resistance by 15% for 12 seconds.
You focus the power of the entire sun on a single point. Does a large amount of damage on hit then deals 700% damage over 10 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Lord Of Order.sDesc: Mirror Drakath has granted you the unrivaled power of order. Wield your weapon to preserve the balance of both realms, and fight for the unity of all life!
aMRM: Lords of Order gain mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on crits. The amount depends on damage relative to their own HP total.

passive.desc: Increases Haste by 20%.
Damage Resistance increased by 15%.
Starting at rank 1, all attacks result in critical hits and can never miss.

active.desc: Attack with an enchanted weapon, dealing damage based on both attack power and spell power.

Heighten the inner peace within you and up to 6 allies, strengthening the foundations of your combat style. Applies Empowerment to all targets for 10 seconds, increasing Strength, Intellect, Endurance, Dexterity, Wisdom, and Luck by 20%.

Purge corruption from yourself and up to 6 allies, healing everyone for a small amount. You return to battle with new strength-- applies Resurgence, which increases all outgoing damage and reduces all incoming damage by 30% for 12 seconds.

Cast a veil of magic that greatly heightens focus in yourself and up to 6 allies. Applies Clarity, which increases haste by 30%, and hit chance and critical hit damage by 40% for up to 6 friendly targets for 8 seconds.

Bestow the unrestrained power of order onto your target. Applies Quixotic for 4 seconds, reducing your target's outgoing physical and magical damage by 105%, and Stability for 25 seconds, which prevents Quixotic from applying. Also applies Order, which reduces your target's outgoing damage by 8% for 15 seconds, stacks to 5.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Martial Artist.sDesc: A master of the martial arts, whose punches and kicks fly with the force of the lands greatest beasts. They drift across land and sea, honing their skills to perfection, and bow to no one but their own code of honor.
aMRM: Martial Artists regain 50 mana each time they Pummel an enemy (affected by Mana Consumption).

passive.desc: Haste increased by 15%.
Dodge increased by 30%.
END and Damage Resistance increased by 20%.

active.desc: Strike your target with a series of punches. Applies different effects based on your current Stance. Can't miss.

Assume a Frogzard Stance, causing Pummel to reduce your target's Damage Resistance by 8%, stacks to 4. Frogzard based Stances also heal you over time while active. If you already have another non mixed Stance active, it's consumed and the applied effect changes:

Gorillaphant: 12% outgoing damage, stacks to 4
Dragon: -10% Hit Chance and Crit Chance, stacks to 2

Effects last 20 seconds, can't miss.

Assume a Gorillaphant Stance, causing Pummel to increase your Crit Damage by 15%, stacks to 6. Gorillaphant based Stances also increase your Crit Chance by 20% while active. If you already have another non mixed Stance active, it's consumed and the applied effect changes:

Frogzard: -8% Physical and Magical Resistance, stacks to 4
Dragon: -15% Haste, stacks to 2

Effects last 20 seconds, can't miss.

Assume a Dragon Stance, causing Pummel to reduce your target's outgoing damage by 15%, stacks to 2. Your first use of Pummel after switching to a Dragon based Stance applies Spinning Dragon to your target, reducing their next hit to 0. If you already have another non mixed Stance active, it's consumed and the applied effect changes:

Frogzard: -5% DoT Resist and DoT, stacks to 6
Gorillaphant: 12% physical damage, stacks to 4

Effects last 20 seconds, can't miss.
Concentrate, healing yourself and applying Fully Focused for 7 seconds. While active, Fully Focused reduces your Mana Costs by 100%.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

MindBreaker.sDesc: You have always been different. Special. Now you have honed your psychic powers and battle skills to a deadly edge. None can withstand the force of your mental attacks.
aMRM: Mindbreakers gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Are struck by an enemy in combat

passive.desc: Increase Crit by 8%
Increase Damage by 15%
When you are at risk of being defeated your amazing mind will occasionally construct a psychic shield around you blocking ALL incoming damage for 5 seconds.

active.desc: Using your mind, you reach out and cause pain to your foe. This is the MindBreaker's basic attack.
A psychic fire engulfs your foe dealing light damage and applies Brain Fog, reducing Haste and Hit by 3% stacking up to 6 times and lasting 10 seconds.
You send out waves of psychic energy dealing moderate damage to one or two enemies near you.
You lash out with a mental spear striking your foe for Damage based on stacks of Brain Fog, also healing yourself for half the difference between your max HP and current HP.
A powerful psychic burst AoE which will hit one or two foes. Damage increases based on stacks of Brain Fog as well as greatly reducing your enemies damage output by for a short time.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Ninja.sDesc: Ninjas operate in silence secrecy. They are capable fighters, but prefer to attack quickly and decisively, eliminating the threat of resistance.
aMRM: Ninjas gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Dodge any attack (restores HP as well)
-Use Thin Air (restores 20 mana, affected by Mana Consumption)

passive.desc: Dodge increased by 15%.
Hit Chance increased by 10% and Crit Chance increased by 15%.

active.desc: A rapid attack studied only by a reclusive few. Damage dealt is based on weapon damage.
Throw a Shuriken at your target, causing them to rapidly bleed over 5 seconds, stacks to 8.

Deliver a deadly strike with your blade. Applies Sharpened Edge, increasing your Crit Chance by 10% and Crit Damage by 25% for 10 seconds.

If Vanish is active, deals increased damage based on how long it's been active, but consumes Vanish.

Throw a Smoke Bomb at your target, reducing their Hit Chance by 15%.

If Vanish is active, your Smoke Bomb catches your target off guard, reducing their Hit Chance by an additional 35%, but consumes Vanish. Both effects last 6 seconds.

Vanish into the shadows, increasing your Haste and Dodge by 100% while restoring 20 mana. Also applies Concealed Blade, causing your attacks to deal bonus damage to targets below 25% of their max HP, with the bonus damage increasing the closer they are to death. Both effects last 5 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

aMRM: Northlands Monks gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Are struck by an enemy in combat
-Also recovers additional mana with each auto attack.

passive.desc: Damage Resistance increased by 10%.
HoT and DoT power increased by 10%.
Outgoing damage, Crit Chance, and Crit Damage increased by 8%.

active.desc: Double click a monster to start Auto Attacking it. This is a basic attack, taught to all adventurers. Damage dealt is based on your weapon damage.
Throw a magical present at your enemy and unwrap another for yourself. Applies a small, medium, or large DoT to one enemy and a small, medium, or large HoT to you. Each effect lasts 4 seconds.
Blast your opponent with a gust of cold air, lowering their Haste by 15% and increasing their incoming damage by 15% for 10 seconds.

Use the starlight from the Northlands to guide the paths of your allies, increasing the Hit Chance, Haste, and outgoing damage for yourself and up to 6 allies by 10% for 10 seconds. Every ally buffed by this skill gives you one stack of Frostval Spirit, which increases your outgoing damage by 5% per stack for 8 seconds.
Channel the spirit of Frostval into a ball of magical energy and launch it at your opponent, dealing huge damage. Your allies give you strength-- damage increases with stacks of Frostval Spirit.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Obsidian Paladin Chronomancer.sDesc: Paladin Chronomancers lead the charge into battle, vowing to protect all who fight alongside them.
aMRM: Paladin Chronomancers gain mana when they:
-Strike a enemy in combat
-Are struck by an enemy in combat
-Are under the effect of Spirits Within (restores 45 mana over 5 seconds)

passive.desc: Endurance increased by 100%.
Hit Chance increased by 10% and Defense increased by 20%.
Haste increased by 5% and Healing Power increased by 20%.

active.desc: Swing your hammer down on your target to deliver a mighty blow. Damage dealt is based on your current health. Can’t crit.

Open a time portal that emits a wave of holy magic. Deals damage and applies Temporal Rift to yourself for 30 seconds, stacks to 4 and is used for your other abilities. Also applies Ascendancy and Reprisal to your target, reducing their Dodge, Haste, Crit Chance, outgoing damage, and defense by 10% for 10 seconds, stacks to 5. If Indomitable is active, applies Radiant Light, a DoT based on your current HP, lasts 6 seconds and doesn't refresh. Deals bonus damage to undead. Can't crit.
Use your holy magic to conjure a protective ward. Heals you and your allies while applying Holy Shield, increasing Haste by 10% and physical and magical defense by 33% for 15 seconds. Always crits.

The light emanates from within you. Massively heals you and your allies while applying Indomitable, increasing your Endurance by 400% for 5 seconds. Applies Guardian Angel to you and your allies for 15 seconds. The next use of Holy Vow consumes it to apply Intervention for 5 seconds, a massive HoT. Always crits.

Unleash the full might of your holy magic. If Temporal Rift is active, deal damage to your target based on the amount you've dealt in up to the past 10 seconds while it was active. Damage scales with each stack of Temporal Rift and consumes those stacks. Applies Spirits Within, restoring 45 mana over 5 seconds. Undead targets are also stunned for 3 seconds. Can’t crit.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Phantasm Chronomancer.sDesc: When a Chronomancer refuses to die a natural death, a Phantom Chronomancer pays them a visit, carrying out their execution by draining them of their temporal powers.
aMRM: The Phantom Chronomancer gains mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Are struck by an enemy in combat

passive.desc: Hit Chance increased by 10% and Crit Chance increased by 5%.
Haste increased by 30% and Dodge increased by 20%.
Outgoing magic damage increased by 25%. If your target has Temporal Rift or Chaos Rift, Final Hours reduces their Haste by 50% for 3 seconds.

active.desc: Swing your scythe at your opponent, dealing unavoidable damage while applying No Escape From Death, reducing their Dodge by 30%, outgoing damage by 20%, and Crit Chance by 15% for 20 seconds. Damage dealt is based on spell power and the number of Seconds to Midnight stacks you have.

Harvest your opponent's time to use against them. Applies Temporal Rift for 10 seconds, which stacks to 4 and is used by your other abilities.

If Death Sentence is active, it's consumed to apply Guillotine, reducing your opponent's Physical and Magical Resistance by 45% for 12 seconds.

Begin the countdown to your opponent's demise. Applies Seconds to Midnight for 12 seconds, increasing the damage of each successive hit of this skill, up to 4 times. 

If Death Sentence is active, it's consumed to apply Impalement, increasing your outgoing damage by 20% for 12 seconds.

An unavoidable attack that signals the end for your opponent. Enshroud your presence, increasing your Dodge by 40% while healing you over time for 8 seconds.

If you have 4 stacks of Seconds to Midnight, applies Death Sentence, increasing your Crit Chance by 40% for 3 seconds.

Carry out your opponent's execution, dealing damage based on the amount you've dealt in the last 10 seconds while Temporal Rift was active. Damage scales with each stack of Temporal Rift and consumes those stacks. Applies Time of Death, removing Seconds to Midnight and Death Sentence while reducing Mana Costs by 50% for 3 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Prismatic ClawSuit.sDesc: The Claw Suit is an unexpected (and unwanted) gift to all of the naughty people of the world. It spreads damage rather than cheer, and it is very good at it.
aMRM: Claw Suits gains mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on crits.  The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total.

passive.desc: Increases STR and INT by 10%
Critical Strike Chance increased 5%

active.desc: A basic attack, taught to all adventurers. Damage dealt is based on your weapon damage.
A quick, damaging attack. Applies 'Naughty' debuff, making this attack stronger, stacking up to 4 times. If 'Nice' is present, it is replaced by Frostburn, a DoT effect on the target.

A weak attack that heals the caster slightly. Applies 'Nice' debuff, making the heal stronger, stacking up to 4 times. If 'Naughty' is present, it is replaced by Holiday Cheer, a HoT effect on the caster.

If the target is Naughty, deals heavy damage and applies Lump of Coal, lowering target haste. If the target is Nice, applies Blitzen's Blitz, increasing caster haste and damage done while reducing damage taken. Does not consume 'Naughty' or 'Nice'.
Reduces your incoming damage by 30% and increases outgoing damage by 20% for 8 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Psionic MindBreaker.sDesc: An exceptionally well trained MindBreaker, skilled in the arts of psionic manipulation, you bend the mental energy within yourself and your opponents to your will.
aMRM: Psionic MindBreakers regenerate mana from the psionic flow around them.

passive.desc: Your psychic powers allow you to conjure metaphysical armor and weapons, decreasing the damage you take by 25%, and increasing your haste and accuracy by 10%.
Starting at rank 1, your precise control over psionic elements allows you to focus your attack power on your main target, dealing double damage to them with your skills.

Your ability to read the flow of combat grants you +15% Crit Chance. Rarely, your ability to read the Psionic Flow gives you clairvoyant visions, vastly increasing your combat capabilities for a few seconds.

active.desc: Assail two opponents with your mental attacks, clouding their minds and decreasing their crit chance by 25% for 4 seconds

Sharpen your mind and engulf two foes in psionic flames. Always hits and crits. For every target you hit, gain a stack of Concentration, increasing your magical damage dealt by 30%, stacking to 6, and lasting 4 seconds.

Open your mind and allow psionic energy to flow in, recovering 35 mana and reducing your mana costs by 10% for 10 seconds, up to 4 stacks. Doing so, however, overloads your senses, causing you to take damage.

Reach out and invade your opponent's mind, stealing their life force and healing yourself for half of your missing hp. Your assault leaves them weak, reducing their defense by 40% for 15 seconds. Cannot be avoided, but cannot crit.
Detonate psions under your control, dealing heavy damage to 2 opponents.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Rogue.sDesc: Rogues are quick-moving, deadly fighters. They prey on any weakness in their opponent, while using poisons and evasive footwork to their advantage.
aMRM: Rogues gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Dodge any attack (restores HP as well)

passive.desc: Haste increased by 15% and crit chance increased by 15%.
Damage taken reduced by 15%.

active.desc: Double click a monster to start Auto Attacking it. This is a basic attack, taught to all adventurers. Damage dealt is based on your weapon damage.

With the strength and agility of a Lycan, even a clumsy flail in an attempt to hit something becomes a nearly inescapable barrage. You tap into your beastly nature and apply one stack of Instinct for 6 seconds, increasing physical outgoing damage by 5% per stack, stacks to 5. Also applies a stacking HoT for 15 seconds.
The thrill of battle gives you a rush. If Keystone Predator is active, applies Endless Hunt for 10 seconds, which increases your crit chance, crit damage, and dodge chance by 15%.
