With your new legs you send a mighty leaping kick to the head of your enemy, causing them, at the very least, to become really dizzy, reducing Critical Strike Chance by 50% and Dodge Chance by 30% for 20 seconds. If the opponent was stunned by Howl of Terror, increases their incoming damage by either 15%, 20%, 25%, or 30% proportional to the length of their stun.

You let loose a blood-curdling call to the sky and your opponent, shaking them to their core. Applies Keystone Predator, which increases outgoing damage by 15% for 15 seconds. Also applies one of four stuns, lasting either 2, 3, 4, or 6 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

ShadowStalker of Time.sDesc: ShadowWalkers can step into a shadow in one time-stream and emerge from a completely different shadow in another time stream.
aMRM: ShadowWalkers gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Dodge any attack (restores HP as well)

passive.desc: Increases Endurance by 25%
Outgoing damage increased by 100%
Increases outgoing damage, Crit Chance and Crit Damage by 12%

active.desc: Gain a stack of Chaos Rift, stacking to 4 and lasting 8 seconds and being used for other abilities. Each strike affects your and your opponent’s Sight, raising your Hit Chance and lowering theirs by 3% per stack. If Temporal Eclipse is active, your strikes additionally affect your and your opponent’s Focus, raising your Dodge and lowering theirs by 3% per stack. Both stack to 5 and last 10 seconds.
Strike in the blink of an eye, wearing away at your opponents’ existence, inflicting your foes with a light DoT for 6 seconds. If Temporal Eclipse is active, instead apply a light HoT to yourself.

Mark your opponent, damaging them and increasing incoming damage to your opponent by 20% for 10 seconds. If Temporal Eclipse is active, instead converge the shadows upon your foe, consuming all your Chaos Rift and inflicting your opponent with a heavy DoT based on how much damage was dealt in the past 10 seconds while it was active.

Sacrifice your life force to fade into the shadows, increasing your Dodge by 300% and drawing your opponents’ Focus for 4 seconds. If Temporal Eclipse is active, instead strike your opponents from the shadows, inflicting large DoT and recovering 30 mana after a short delay.

Enshroud the battlefield with shadows, reducing your opponents’ Hit Chance by 30%. Become one with the engulfing darkness, gaining Temporal Eclipse, increasing your Crit Chance by 80% and changing your skills’ effects. Gain Turbulent Rift as well, increasing your Haste by 30%. All effects last 5 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Yami no Ronin.sDesc: A master of blades without a master, the Yami no Ronin strikes from the cover of darkness by bending the shadows to their will.
aMRM: Yami no Ronin's gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Dodge any attack (restores HP as well)

passive.desc: Increases Dodge by 80%
Increases outgoing damage by 35%
Increases Haste and Crit chance by 15%

active.desc: Attack your enemy from the shadows using the cover of darkness. Each hit applies Flash, increasing your Outgoing Damage, Hit Chance, and Crit Chance by 4% and Revealed, reducing your Dodge by 7% and Damage Resistance by 4%. Both effects last 15 seconds and stack to 20.

Sequentially cut through your opponent’s defenses with three strikes, each dealing moderate damage. The first strike increases your outgoing damage by 20% for 9 seconds, the second strike increases your outgoing physical damage by 20% for 7 seconds, and the third strike increases your Crit Damage by 150% for 5 seconds. Effects do not refresh. Always hits but can’t crit.

Wrap your weapon in shadows and lash out, releasing a shockwave of homing dark energy. The darkness gradually consumes your opponent before fading away, applying a DoT that grows progressively stronger for 10 seconds. Also has a 35% chance to apply Spinning Dragon, reducing their next attack to 0 damage. Always hits but can't crit.
Gouge your target with your weapon, dealing strong damage. You also absorb their life force, restoring your health based on damage dealt. Also applies 1 stack of Flash and Revealed.

Use your control of the shadows to tear through reality itself, dealing unavoidable strong damage. If Yami is applied on your opponent, deals massive damage depending on how much time is left on before it fades (less time means more damage). Consumes all stacks of Flash and Revealed.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Battle Warrior.sDesc: Warriors are quintessential melee fighters.  Simple, direct, and effective, they are masters of armed combat, and quite durable.
aMRM: Battle Warriors gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Are struck by an enemy in combat

passive.desc: You deal 10% additional damage with physical attacks.
Damage taken reduced by 10%.

active.desc: A basic attack, taught to all adventurers. Damage dealt is based on your weapon damage.
A powerful strike, dealing 190% weapon damage.
A precise blow which stuns your opponent for 4 seconds.
Your next two auto attacks taken within 5 seconds will be powerful critical hits which cannot be avoided.
Challenge your opponent, dealing damage while reducing your incoming damage by 50% for 10 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

BeastMaster.sDesc: The Beastmaster can call upon any manner of creature to fight by their side. How? I dunno, Animals just like them. They use their skills in animal communication and improvise strategies to defeat their enemies.
aMRM: Beastmasters gain mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on crits. The amount depends on the damage relative to “their own” HP total.

passive.desc: Haste increased by 30%.
Outgoing damage and Hit Chance increased by 10%.

Starting at rank 1, upon performing a Follow Up you pet your companion, Uplifting them which increases your outgoing physical damage by 5% for 8 seconds, stacks to 8. At rank 10, increases your Crit Chance by 10%.

active.desc:
Fire an arrow at your target, signaling your companion to perform an action. 

Using another skill after damaging a target with Signal Arrow will cause your companion to perform a Follow Up, enhancing the effect of that skill.

Command your companion to attack the source of your target's vision, even if they have no eyes. Applies Eye Injury, reducing your target's Hit Chance by 15% and applying a DoT for 6 seconds.

Follow Up: Applies Eye Gouge, reducing your target's Hit Chance by 25% and applying a stronger DoT for 6 seconds.

Command your companion to cast a protective ward. Heals you and applies Borrowed Wings, increasing your Dodge by 20% for 6 seconds. 

Follow Up: Applies Eye in the Sky, increasing your Dodge by 40% for 6 seconds.

When cast out of combat will summon a Grifflet if you don't have a pet equipped.

Command your companion to distract your target by attacking it from a different angle. Applies Misdirection, reducing your target's Damage Resistance by 15% for 10 seconds. Also has a 30% chance to stun your target for 2 seconds.

Follow Up: Applies Distracted, reducing your target's Damage Resistance by 30% for 10 seconds while also stunning them for 2 seconds.

You stick a piece of delicious bacon onto your target, causing your companion to becomes fully focused and attack your target voraciously. Applies Treat, increasing your outgoing damage by 20% while reducing your target's dodge by 50% for 14 seconds.

Follow Up: Applies Feast, increasing your outgoing damage by 40% for 14 seconds. Can't miss.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

aMRM: The Blood Sorceress gains mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on crits.  The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total.

passive.desc: Increases Damage Output by 10%
Increases Healing by 20% but lowers Endurance by 15%.
Once in a great while, you tap the full potential of your powerful blood and greatly increase your damage output, damage resistance and haste for a short time.

active.desc: Your thirst for blood forces you to constantly seek it. Deals 40% damage but heals you with each strike. The heal is increased as your health lowers.
Deals Moderate Damage up to 3 enemies. Regains some of your health a couple of moments after casting. (Costs 10% of Max Health per target)
Blasts up to 3 targets with Weapon Damage. Applies Hypothermia to your opponent and Hyperthermia to you, lowering their haste by 20% and increasing yours by 20% for 6 seconds.

Applies Wrath of the Blood Mage on you and up to 3 hostile targets, Healing you and your enemies. After a few moments, deals Spell Damage to your foes and Attack Damage to you. Can't Miss but can't Crit.

Lowers your blood count to empower yourself, granting you new awaken abilities. Applies Arcane Pact, increasing your Spell Damage by 100%, and Mirroring Pact, increasing your Damage Resistance by 20%. All pacts last for 20 seconds. (Costs 10% of Max Health)
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

aMRM: Time Assassins gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Dodge any attack (restores HP as well)

passive.desc: Increases Hit Chance and Crit Chance by 10%
Increases Dodge by 12%
Rarely, when your hit points drop below 10% and your life is in danger, your health and mana will be restored to full and all damage taken will be significantly reduced for 10 seconds.

active.desc: You wield Strike Blades. Manipulating with time allows you to attack incredibly fast, but sacrificing power.

Push time forward with your next strike dealing Light Damage to your opponent. Applies Push Time, increasing your Dodge and Haste by 8% for 12 seconds, stacks to 5. If Reverse Time is in play, Strike Blades will replace it with Temporal Blades increasing your Damage Output by 30% and applying Pull Time, lowering the opponent's Haste and Dodge by 15% for 12 seconds.

Relieve time with your next strike dealing Moderate Damage to your opponent. Applies Deadlock to yourself, stacks 4 times. Once max stacked Deadlock will consume itself and apply Reverse Time, granting you a Moderate HoT for 10 seconds.

Generate time with your next strike dealing Moderate Damage to your opponent. Applies Condense Time, increasing Critical Strike Chance and Critical Strike Damage by 10% for 12 seconds, stacks to 5. If Reverse Time is in play, Strike Blades will replace it with Temporal Blades increasing all damage out by 30% and apply Depress Time, lowering the opponent's Critical Strike Chance and Critical Strike Damage by 15% for 12 seconds.

Sever your foe's mind in time causing them to go insane. For the next 6 seconds the target will hit itself instead of you. If Reverse Time isn't in play you get Enhance Time, reducing the damage your target takes by 15%. If Reverse Time is in play, its removed and you get Temporal Blades while your opponent gets Corrupt Time. Temporal Blades increases your damage by 30%. Corrupt Time increases your opponent's damage by 15%. They last 12 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Chrono Commandant.sDesc: ChronoCommanders alter the flow of time to tremendous effect in battle.
aMRM: ChronoCommanders gain mana when they:
* Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
* Are struck by an enemy in combat

passive.desc: Endurance increased by 150%.
Physical damage taken reduced by 10%.

active.desc: A basic attack, taught to all adventurers. Damage dealt is based on your weapon damage.
Deals damage to your target and applies Temporal Rift to you. Stacks to 4, lasts 30 seconds, and is used by your other abilities.
Rollback time to heal yourself. If Temporal Rift is active, the amount healed is increased for each stack. Also applies Continuum, reducing aken by 55% for 22 seconds. Always crits.

If Temporal Rift is active, deal damage to your target based on the amount you've dealt in up to the past 10 seconds while it was active. Damage scales with each stack of Temporal Rift and consumes those stacks.

Sever time for your target, placing a DoT effect on them that doubles in strength each time it ticks while reducing their outgoing damage by 25% for 10 seconds. Also applies Focus for 4 seconds, which forces your target to attack only you for the duration.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Classic Guardian.sDesc: Guardians are awe inspiring fighters, demonstrating physical and magical prowess. They harness their strength from the ancient Guardian Dragons.
aMRM: Guardians gain mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on crits.  The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total.

passive.desc: Haste increased 10%
Strength and Intellect increased 10%

active.desc: A strong attack known only to disciplined fighters. Damage dealt is based on weapon damage.
Furiously bombard your opponent with strikes. Damages and cripples your target, reducing outgoing damage by 5% for 10 seconds. This effect can stack up to 3 times.
Use the pointy end of your weapon for stunningly sharp attacks. Applies Keen, increasing critical strike chance by 15%, and has a chance to stun the target briefly.
Empower yourself. Releases blinding damage if your weapon is Keen, otherwise increases your resistance to incoming blows.
Calls forth mighty dragon flames to scorch your opponents.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Doom Metal Necro.sDesc: Heavy Metal Necros are a force to be reckoned with in a mosh pit. Like the band they’re die-hard fans of, they utilize their deathly riffs, mighty voices, and necromantic abilities to crush their foes into submission.
aMRM: Heavy Metal Necros gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Are struck by an enemy in combat

passive.desc: Increases Endurance by 300%.
Increases Outgoing Damage and Hit Chance by 15%.
Increases crit chance by 25%

active.desc: Swipe at your opponent with a cruel cut. Twist their senses, reducing their Haste by 25% for 10 seconds.

Unleash a wicked soundwave, summoning otherworldly ghouls to mob your foe. Applies Reverberating, increasing Damage by 25% for 3 seconds, and Forgone Conclusion, lasting 4 seconds and restoring health based on damage dealt during the duration upon expiry.

Conjure an unholy undead minion to assail your opponent’s body and mind, dealing massive damage that increases the lower your health is. The assault leaves your foe with a Shattered Psyche, decreasing their Crit Chance by 20% for 10 seconds. If Cursed Echo is present, you gain Insanity, increasing your Crit Chance by 30% for 40 seconds.
Unleash sonic destruction upon your foe, Terrifying them and reducing their Dodge by 30% for 14 seconds. You enter a Deranged Frenzy, increasing your haste by 30% for 14 seconds.

Sacrifice your health and swear upon a Dark Pact, increasing the damage you take by 33% for 5 seconds, stacking to 3. If Reverberating is present, the pact grants you great power, granting you Cursed Echo and increasing your damage dealt by 33% for 8 seconds, stacking to 3.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

DragonSoul Shinobi.sDesc: Ninjas are hailed for their dexterity. Dragons are praised for their strength. And when the Ninja trains in the way of the Dragon, they shall become the Dragon Shinobi, master of brutal warfare!
aMRM: Dragon Shinobi gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Dodge any attack (restores HP as well)

passive.desc: Increases endurance by 18% and Dodge by 15%
Increases haste by 10% and Damage over Time effects are 30% stronger.
Every attack gives a small chance of increasing all Damage over Time by 400% for 20 seconds.

active.desc: A rapid attack studied only by a reclusive few. Damage dealt is based on weapon damage.

Throw a deadly shadow poison tipped kunai at your target. Shadow kunai will continually damage your opponent from a far, stacking 10 times and lasting 8 seconds if not restacked. You gain foresight with each throw, making all auto attacks within the next 5 seconds crit.

Focus all your chi into restoring your life force over time. Chi Heal lasts 4 seconds and cannot stack. As the chi flows through your veins you become rejuvenated and whole. Chi Heal also increases your Endurance by 50% for 14 seconds. Chi Heal cannot stack.
Meditate, transferring yourself into the shadow realm to restore your mana. While meditating you can't attack or use abilities and you will take up to 80% less damage for 5 seconds.

Hit your opponent with a Flaming Dragon strike for moderate damage to burn your target over time. Flaming Dragon doesn't stack and lasts 15 seconds. You get a stack of Shadow Kunai as well which deals damage over time, stacks 10 times and lasts 8 seconds if not restacked. This attack applies Spinning Dragon which reduces your target's next hit to 0 damage.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Dragonslayer.sDesc: Dragonslayers are specifically designed to hunt dragons and dragonkin, but are less effective against other types of monsters.
aMRM: Dragonslayers gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Strike an enemy with Scorched Steel (recovers 5 mana)
-Are struck by an enemy in combat

passive.desc: Hit Chance and outgoing physical damage increased by 10%.
Damage Resistance increased by 10%.
Starting at rank 1. All skills (except your Auto Attack) deal increased damage to Dragonkin. At rank 10, increases your Endurance by 10%.

active.desc: A strong attack known only to disciplined fighters. Damage dealt is based on weapon damage.

Ignite your blade with flame and unleash a fiery attack, restoring 5 mana on hit and applying Charred to your target, reducing their Damage Resistance by 15%. 

If your target is afflicted with Dragonbane, applies Cindered Scales, reducing their Damage Resistance by an additional 15%. Both effects last 15 seconds.

Thrust your weapon forward, puncturing your target and applying Impaled, a damage over time (DoT) effect while causing your adrenaline to flow, healing you over time. 

If your target is afflicted with Dragonbane, applies Infected Wound, an even stronger DoT. If your target has an Infected Wound, you gain a surge of adrenaline, increasing your Haste and Crit Chance by 15%. All effects last 15 seconds.

A powerful attack that knocks even the largest of dragons off their feet. Applies Weakened, reducing your target's outgoing damage by 15% for 15 seconds.

If your target is afflicted with Dragonbane, applies Incapacitated, reducing their outgoing damage by an additional 15% for 15 seconds while also stunning them for 3 seconds.
A fierce dragonslaying attack. If your target is Dragonkin, they are inflicted with Dragonbane, which causes the next skill you use to apply an additional effect. Can't miss.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Dragonslayer General.sDesc: Congratulations, you’ve proven your worth as a Dragonslayer and earned the right to call yourself a Dragonslayer General! Only the best of the best can quell the wrath of such impossibly powerful beasts and live to tell the tale.
aMRM: Dragonslayer Generals gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Are struck by an enemy in combat

passive.desc: Crit Chance and Crit Damage increased by 10%.
Outgoing damage and Damage Resistance increased by 25%.

Starting at rank 1, all skills (except your Auto Attack) deal increased damage to Dragonkin. At Rank 10, if your target is Dragonkin, Dragon's Demise applies Execute to yourself for 1 second, causing your skills to instantly slay Dragonkin below 10% of their max HP.

active.desc: A strong attack known only to disciplined fighters. Damage dealt is based on weapon damage.

Ignite your blade with flame and unleash a blazing attack, restoring 5 mana on hit and applying Charred to your target, reducing their Damage Resistance by 15%. 

If your target is afflicted with General's Dragonbane, applies Seared Scales, reducing their Damage Resistance by 8%, stacks to 5. Both effects last 15 seconds.

A powerful shout that deals damage and inspires you, increasing your Haste and Damage Resistance by 20% for 15 seconds, doubled to 40% total when fighting Dragonkin. Applies Focus to your target for 4 seconds, forcing them to attack only you for the duration.

If your target is afflicted with General's Dragonbane, applies Instilled Fear, reducing their Haste and Dodge by 25% for 20 seconds. Can't miss.

Become adept against your target's actions the longer you battle them. Deals damage and applies Keen Eye, increasing your Hit Chance, Crit Chance, and Crit Damage by 5%, stacks to 5.

If your target is afflicted with General's Dragonbane, applies Piercing Eye, reducing their Hit Chance, Crit Chance, and Damage by 10%, stacks to 5. Both effects last 15 seconds.

A devastating dragonslaying attack. If your target is Dragonkin, they are inflicted with General's Dragonbane, which causes the next skill you use to apply an additional effect. Also applies Forgone Conclusion for 4 seconds, which upon fading, heals you based on your damage dealt while it was active. Can't miss.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Flame Dragon Warrior.sDesc: Conquer the world with the power of FIRE and DRAGONS.
aMRM: Fire Dragon Warriors gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Are struck by an enemy in combat

passive.desc: The magic of dragon scales gives you 30% spell resistance.
The power of dragons blood gives you 30% endurance increase.
30% increase to DoT

active.desc: A powerful sweeping attack taught to disciplined fighters.

Blast your foes with an unavoidable burst of flame that cannot crit. Build up to 3 stacks of Dragon’s Roar, which increase your DoT damage by 50% per stack, last 11 seconds and empower your other abilities.

Akriloth grants you power to burn your foes with an intense DoT for 10 seconds, and deal immense damage based on your stacks of Dragon’s Roar. The flames are so intense that, 30% of the time, they stun your foe for 6 seconds.

Set yourself Ablaze, increasing your damage dealt by 35% for 12 seconds. If you’re empowered by stacks of Dragon’s Roar, strike your foe for high damage and consume them, granting you Extra Defense, reducing all incoming damage by 60% for 15 seconds.
DESTROY with the power of your rage, dealing damage to your foes and applying a powerful DoT for 8 seconds based on your stacks of Dragon’s Roar.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

aMRM: Eternal Chronomancers gain mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on critical hits.  The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total.

passive.desc: Hit chance increased by 25%
Haste increased by 15%
Critical strike chance increased by 15%.

active.desc: Deals damage based on your weapon damage.

Strike your opponent with the unavoidable ebb of time, damaging them and reducing their Dodge by 25% for 5 seconds, and gaining a stack of Deadlock. Using this skill while you have 8 stacks of Deadlock consumes them to Enter Infinity, increasing your Crit Chance by 20% for 3 seconds.

Strike your opponent with the unavoidable flow of time, damaging them and gaining a stack of Temporal Rift and Deadlock. Using this skill while you have 8 stacks of Deadlock consumes them to enter The Fourth Dimension, increasing physical damage dealt by 20% for 3 seconds.

If Temporal Rift is present, deal damage to your target based on the amount you've dealt in up to the past 10 seconds while it was active. Damage scales with each stack of Temporal Rift and consumes those stacks.

Shift the present timeline in your favor, gaining Taking Eternity, reducing your damage taken by 30%, and increasing your damage dealt and critical damage by 20% for 15 seconds. If Temporal Rift is present, you heal for 10 seconds based on the number of stacks you have.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Imperial Chunin.sDesc: A Chunin is a ninja field commander. Highly trained to attack from stealth but focusing on strength and power rather than agility and speed. A Chunin can handle multiple enemies at once.
aMRM: Chunin gain mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on crits.  The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total.

passive.desc: Haste increased by 5% and outgoing damage increased by 15%.
Hit Chance and Damage Resistance increased by 10%.
Rarely, when using Chi Strike, the spirits of your ancestors flow into you, greatly increasing your Haste, Dodge, mana regen, and health regen for 6 seconds.

active.desc: A basic attack that strikes two targets, enhanced with your natural chi. Has a chance to heal the user over time.
Hits up to two enemies, slowing them by 50% for 4 seconds.
Hits up to two enemies for moderate damage, reducing all of their chances to hit by 50% for 6 seconds.
Hits up to two enemies near you dealing moderate damage. This attack also has a 50% chance to reduce their next hit to 0 Damage.
You focus your chi into a quick and brutal attack, hitting up to two monsters around you for high damage while stunning them for 2 seconds. Can't miss.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Infinite Legion Dark Caster.sDesc: Your dedication to the Undead Legion has compelled Dage to grant you the immortal, timeless, and infinite power of Dark Casters past. Now you, too, may bask in the power of an era once lost. (This class shares its skills with the Evolved / Legion Dark Caster Class.)
aMRM: Evolved Dark Casters gain mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on crits.  The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total.

passive.desc: Increase Crit by 12%
Damage increased by 10%, Dodge increased by 15%
all physical damage received reduced by 12%

active.desc: A malevolent spell unique to Dark Casters. Fire out a long-range blast of dark energy, dealing 100% spell damage with a 20% chance to make your target flinch, stunning them for 1 second.

A darkness spell that reduces hit chance and haste by 7%, causing their sight to deteriorate. Applies Blighted Sight, lowering your target's hit chance and haste slightly for each stack with a maximum of 3 stacks.
Shadowy and explosive bolts are shot from your fingertips to deal moderately strong damage to two, nearby enemies.

As your life nears death, the Guide of the River Styx contracts with you to bring more souls to the Underworld in exchange for life and Styx Water. Heals you and 2 friendly targets and applies Styx Water to the first target, which gives a moderate heal-over-time for 12 seconds.

A powerful spell that unleashes the intangible and unavoidable darkness to lash out on up to 3 targets' souls. Their souls lie in agony and begin to rot, applying Decay to negate all healing for 10 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Legendary Naval Commander.sDesc: True Naval commanders know they need to battle with a crew!
aMRM: Naval Commander gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Dodge any attack (restores HP as well)

passive.desc: Crit Chance increased by 20%.
Haste increased by 10% and Dodge increased by 30%.
Damage Resistance increased by 15%.

active.desc: An attack taught to all Naval Commanders. Damage dealt is based on your weapon damage. You are invigorated by combat itself and recover 5 mana on hit. Can't miss.
Perform a Counterthrust with your cutlass, reducing your target's outgoing damage by 40% for 1 second. Also applies Strike'n Parry, further reducing Outgoing Damage by 30% for 10 seconds.
Fire your pistol at your target, wounding them and reducing their Damage Resistance by 30% for 10 seconds.

The presence of the captain inspires everyone in battle. Grants you and your allies an HoT and increases Haste and Outgoing Damage by 15%. Also applies a stack of Armada to you for each ally, increasing the damage of all skills except En Garde by 50%, stacks to 4. Effects last 15 seconds.

You sidestep attacks with your Sea Legs, increasing your Dodge by 30% for 1 second.
You pull out your second pistol and unleash a hail of bullets. Applies Focus for 4 seconds, which forces your target to attack only you for the duration.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Legion DoomKnight.sDesc: Even DoomKnights swear their service to, or are made to serve Dage. Their soul’s have been claimed by both Dage and Doom.
aMRM: Legion DoomKnights gain mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on crits.  The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total.

passive.desc: Haste and outgoing damage increased by 10%.
Crit Chance increased by 10% and Hit Chance increased by 5%.
Damage Resistance and Endurance increased by 8%.

active.desc: A basic attack, taught to all adventurers. Damage dealt is based on your weapon damage.

Applies Touch of Doom and Touch of Death to your opponent, reducing their Damage Resistance and outgoing damage by 3%. Applies Touch of Demise to you, increasing your outgoing damage by 5%. All auras last 8 seconds and stack to 15.
Using Dage's knowledge of souls you assault your opponent's soul directly and take some of their force to heal yourself.

You immerse yourself in the Darkness of the Legion and direct that power towards your opponent dealing large damage. Applies Torment to the target for 5 seconds, reducing their hit chance and haste by 10%. This is furthered with Shadow Step, continuing to reduce their hit chance and haste by an additional 15% for 5 seconds.

Doom hastens and the Legion beckons. Does a strike for large damage and hastens your opponent's doom dealing a huge DoT over 15 Seconds. Also adds Decay, Cannot Heal for 10 seconds preventing your opponent from healing. Also applies Legion, increasing your hit chance by 15% for 8 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Legion SwordMaster Assassin.sDesc: Legion Blademaster Assassin are the brute ninjas of the Legion. With harsh lifestyles, they can overcome any punishment to them. While being swift and nimble, they also do massive amount of damage when on the brink of death.
aMRM: Legion Blademaster Assassins gain mana when they:
Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
Dodge any attack (restores HP as well)

passive.desc: Increases Damage Output and Damage Taken by 10%.
Increases Endurance by 15%
Increases Hit Chance and Dodge by 12%

active.desc: A blade strike from the hilt, fast enough to hit before your opponent gets a chance to act.
Your inner Legion beckons, dealing more damage on the verge of death. Also has 50% chance to apply Spinning Dragon, reducing their next attack to 0 damage. Always crits and can't miss.

As you come back to the living temporarily you empower yourself, increasing your Dodge by 25% and Outgoing Damage and Critical Strike Damage by 30% for 18 seconds. As your body deteriorates back into an undead form your flesh mutates, applying a moderate DoT to yourself while preventing you from receiving any healing from sources other than life drain for the duration.
Lashes out on anyone too close, dealing moderate damage at up to 3 targets while draining their life force, healing you for some of the damage done.
Unleashes a wave of darkness dealing moderately strong damage at up to 4 targets around you while applying a moderate DoT and lowering their Crit Chance by 20% for 4 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

LightMage.sDesc: The Order of the LightMages formed to support the Champion of Light, and need every mage available to fight the battle against Chaos!
aMRM: LightMages gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Are struck by an enemy in combat

passive.desc: Increases Intellect by 8%
Increases Haste by 8%
Increases all damage done by 10%

active.desc: A basic attack, taught to all adventurers. Damage dealt is based on your weapon damage.

Cast down an elemental light beacon upon the target. Does lite damage and applies In The Beacon increasing the amount of damage your opponent takes by 2% per stack and lasts 10 seconds if not re-stacked. (Stacks up to 50 times)

Beam your opponent with a ball of pure light. Deals significant damage that is guaranteed to hit but cannot crit. Each hit applies a stack of Blinding Light which decreases your opponent's chance to hit by 5% per stack and lasts 12 seconds if not restacked. Maxes out at 2 stacks.

Casts a net of light upon your allies. Heals yourself and up to 6 allies and applies Lumen, increasing outgoing damage, Crit Chance, Crit Damage, Hit Chance, Dodge, Haste and Damage Resistance by 8% for 12 seconds.
You focus the power of the entire sun on a single point. Does a large amount of damage on hit then deals 400% damage over 10 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Necromancer.sDesc: Necromancers are powerful, but twisted magic users who command undead minions. They gain power from death and decay.
aMRM: Necromancers gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Are struck by an enemy in combat

passive.desc: Magical Resistance increased by 30%.
Haste increased by 20% and Hit Chance increased by 10%.
Outgoing damage increased by 15%.

active.desc: A basic attack, taught to all adventurers. Damage dealt is based on your weapon damage.
Use your Necrotic magic to assault your opponent, commanding your pet to attack for massive damage.
Leech life from the target, dealing damage while healing you. Also weakens the target, lowering damage by 40% for 6 seconds.
Infect yourself, damaging yourself and restoring 20 MP.

Summons an undead minion to your side (only appears if summoned outside of combat). Also sends your minion into a frenzy increasing all damage by 150% but casting a DoT on yourself, damaging you over time.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Lycan.sDesc: You’re a firm believer that might makes right and shaving is for losers. Also, you’ve contracted Lycanthropy. That could be a problem if not for it playing right into your interests.
aMRM: Lycans gain mana when they strike an enemy in combat or are struck by an enemy in combat.

passive.desc: Haste increased by 15% and crit chance increased by 15%.
Damage taken reduced by 15%.

active.desc: Double click a monster to start Auto Attacking it. This is a basic attack, taught to all adventurers. Damage dealt is based on your weapon damage.

With the strength and agility of a Lycan, even a clumsy flail in an attempt to hit something becomes a nearly inescapable barrage. You tap into your beastly nature and apply one stack of Instinct for 6 seconds, increasing physical outgoing damage by 5% per stack, stacks to 5. Also applies a stacking HoT for 15 seconds.
The thrill of battle gives you a rush. If Keystone Predator is active, applies Endless Hunt for 10 seconds, which increases your crit chance, crit damage, and dodge chance by 15%.

With your new legs you send a mighty leaping kick to the head of your enemy, causing them, at the very least, to become really dizzy, reducing Critical Strike Chance by 50% and Dodge Chance by 30% for 20 seconds. If the opponent was stunned by Howl of Terror, increases their incoming damage by either 15%, 20%, 25%, or 30% proportional to the length of their stun.

You let loose a blood-curdling call to the sky and your opponent, shaking them to their core. Applies Keystone Predator, which increases outgoing damage by 15% for 15 seconds. Also applies one of four stuns, lasting either 2, 3, 4, or 6 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Mage.sDesc: Mages are the quintessential magic user. They attack from a distance, able to cause great harm or restrict a target's actions.
aMRM: Mages gain mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on critical hits.  The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total.

passive.desc: Outgoing magic damage and Hit Chance increased by 10%
Damage taken reduced by 10%

active.desc: Double click a monster to start Auto Attacking it. This is a basic attack, taught to all adventurers. Damage dealt is based on your weapon damage.
Hurls flame at your target, dealing damage and applying Scorched, causing them to take damage over time. If Frozen Blood is active on your target, it is consumed to deal double damage.
Launches a freezing shard at your target, dealing damage and applying Frozen Blood if Scorched is not active, reducing their Haste and outgoing damage by 20% for 10 seconds.

Causes energies within your target to become unstable and burst forth, dealing moderate damage to your target and light damage to up to 3 additional targets. If Scorched is active on a target, it Detonates, dealing damage after 1 second.
Surround yourself with a magical shield, transferring a portion of the damage you take your mana instead of your health for 10 seconds. Damage reduction is based on your Spell Power.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Master Ranger.sDesc: Rangers are stealthy, wealthy and wise to the ways of their opponents. Able to take down tyrants without blinking an eye or breaking a bowstring, you’ll range far and wide in this armor, gaining gold and glory!
aMRM: Rangers gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Dodge any attack (restores HP as well)

passive.desc: Increases Dodge by 15% and Haste by 7%.
Crit chance increased by 15% and Hit Chance increased by 10%.

active.desc: Nock an arrow, and loose it at faraway foes.

Mark your targets for death and nock your arrows, applying Death mark to your foes and increasing the damage they take by 5% per stack. Gain stacks of Mark, which empowers your other abilities. Both auras stack to 6 and last 10 seconds.

Launches a flaming arrow at up to 2 targets, dealing damage while also burning them over time for 10 seconds. Damage Over Time effect is increased for each stack of Marks, does not consume stacks of Marks.

Fire an explosive tipped arrow which detonates on impact, dealing high damage. Up to 1 other nearby target can also be caught in the explosion for minor damage. Damage is increased for each stack of Marks, consumes stacks of Marks.

Fire a magic arrow inscribed with runes at up to 2 targets, dealing moderate damage to them while also healing yourself over 10 seconds. Heal Over Time effect is increased for each stack of Marks, does not consume stacks of Marks.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Oracle.sDesc: The oracle is a strong healer and can see into everyone’s future, past and present. He is excellent at maintaining the health and status of his friends. He can also notify his friends of their opponents weaknesses and strengths making him the perfect one to accept a party invite from.
aMRM: Oracles gain mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on critical hits.  The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total.

passive.desc: Wisdom is increased by 20%.
All healing increased by 15%.
On rare occasions the oracle and his entire group are granted Divine Recovery fully healing them and granting temporary invulnerability.

active.desc: A basic attack, taught to all adventurers. Damage dealt is based on your weapon damage.
Your next auto attack will be a critical strike. Has a chance to apply Prophetic Vision increasing intellect and critical strike damage by 30% for 15 seconds.

Heals yourself and up to 6 others, while placing a random judgment on each based on their relationship with the Divine. The heal is twice as strong if another player is selected. If an enemy is selected, you will be healed for twice the amount.

You tap into your photographic memory to foretell the future. Applies Shared Link to either you or an ally (click an ally to target them). Shared Link increases chance to dodge by 50% and critical strike chance by 30% for 10 seconds.

Advanced precognition allows you to read your opponent's timeline and notify allies of their weaknesses. You deal moderate damage and apply either Blocked, reducing 80% of your opponent's physical damage, or Ignored, reducing 80% of your opponent's magical damage for 8 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Pirate.sDesc: Pirates are opportunistic rogues and treasure hunters of the sea. Combat might not always go their way but they will do the best they can to make the most of any combat situation they find themselves in.
aMRM: Pirates gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Dodge any attack (restores HP as well)

passive.desc: Haste increased by 6% and Dodge increased by 12%.
Crit Chance increased by 10%.
Outgoing damage increased by 10%.

active.desc: A basic attack, taught to all adventurers. Damage dealt is based on your weapon damage.
A cutlass is the primary weapon of a pirate and is their weapon of choice. Applies Cutlass and Combo, increasing your Crit Chance by 3% and Crit Damage by 7% for 8 seconds, stacks to 5.

You use your pirate sense to steal treasure to aid you in battle, who knows exactly what you'll get? Applies 1 of 3 effects to yourself:

Plunder Health: HoT
Plunder Dodge: 30% Dodge
Plunder Crit: 30% Crit Damage

Effects last 8 seconds.

You always carry a pistol around saving it for the opportune moment. Applies either Cannon Burn, damaging your target over time, or Cannon Fodder, reducing your target's Damage Resistance by 20%. Both effects last 8 seconds.
Let off a blast of cannon fire from your conveniently nearby but hidden ship. Applies Cannon Wound, reducing your target's outgoing damage by 25% for 8 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Pyromancer.sDesc: For as long as you can recall, you have been drawn to fire. The heat, the light, the destructive and life-giving properties, it called to you. Now you have mastered your control over the fire magic burning within you!
aMRM: Pyromancers gain mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on crits.  The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total.

passive.desc: Incoming Damage reduced by 10%
Outgoing damage and Hit Chance increased by 10%
Haste increased by 15%

active.desc: A basic attack, taught to all Pyromancers. Damage dealt is based on your weapon damage.
Scorches your target for light damage while applying Scorch, a DoT for 6 seconds.

A blast of flame leaps from your hands burning your target. Applies Withering Burn, a DoT that also reduces their outgoing damage by 10% for 8 seconds. If Scorch is active on your target, it is consumed to deal double damage to them and apply Incinerate, increasing their incoming DoT damage by 10% for 10 seconds, stacks to 10.

Recovers HP and surrounds yourself in a magical shield of fire. Applies Burning Ward for 6 seconds, reducing your incoming damage by 50% while also causing any foe who strikes you while it's active to take damage, capped at 1,000 per hit. If Scorch is active on your target, they receive double damage and the cap is increased to 2,000.

A massive fireball flies at your target exploding for HIGH damage while also applying a DoT for 10 seconds. If Scorch is active on your target, it is consumed to deal double damage to them and apply Incinerate, increasing their incoming DoT damage by 10% for 10 seconds, stacks to 10.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Royal BattleMage.sDesc: The Battlemage focuses on taking down his opponents as quickly as possible. He is capable of focusing greater amounts of mana into each spell for the maximum effect. He specializes in wearing heavy armor for defense in order to spend all of his mana on offensive spells.
aMRM: Battlemages gain mana each time they Auto Attack. Also, their skills manipulate mana in different ways.

passive.desc: Physical Damage received reduced by 20%.
+15% Intellect and 10% Crit Chance
Increases haste by 10%.

active.desc: Every strike is enhanced with arcane energies that re-energize the Battlemage for 10 mana. Always hits but can't crit.

Conjure a powerful, explosive, arcane blast, dealing incredible damage to your foes. BattleMages take advantage of the stray mana scattered in combat, inflicting even more devastating damage the lower your mana is!

Burst with explosive arcane fire, dealing more damage the lower your mana is while overwhelming your foes with Arcane Weakness, increasing their damage taken by 15% for 20 seconds. If your blade is enchanted, arcane power surges through your opponent’s body, reducing their haste by 35% for 12 seconds.

Break down nearby mana and shatter it, dealing damage to your foes and forming the aberrant mana into an Arcane Ward, reducing incoming damage by 40% for 10 seconds and healing you twice soon afterwards. The heal is increased the lower your mana is.

Accumulate arcane power in your weapon, preparing your next few spells with incredible power. For 3 seconds, increase your outgoing damage by 80% and Hit Chance by 60%. Lingering energies enchant your armor, increasing your Haste by 15% for 10 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Rustbucket.sDesc: This bucket of bolts is past its prime. Somehow, it still functions, but it won't be of much use.
aMRM: Rustbuckets gain mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on crits.  The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total.

passive.desc: Your haste is increased by 15%
All damage taken is reduced by 10%

active.desc: A basic attack, taught to all adventurers. Damage dealt is based on your weapon damage.
A rapid assault dealing 225% weapon damage. Cannot miss but also cannot crit
An energy-based ranged attack dealing physical and magical damage. Lowers the enemy's chance to hit by 20% as well.
Emits a burst of electrical energy that will bounce to up to 4 targets, dealing more damage with each bounce.
Reduces all incoming damage by an amount based on Attack Power for 20 seconds
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

aMRM: The Scarlet Sorceress gains mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on crits.  The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total.

passive.desc: Increases Damage Output by 12%
Increases Healing by 25% but lowers Endurance by 10%.
Once in a great while, you tap the full potential of your powerful blood and greatly increase your damage output, damage resistance and haste for a short time.

active.desc: Your thirst for blood forces you to constantly seek it. Your weapon is imbued with scarlet sorcery and drains blood with each strike. The magic weakens your weapon's effectiveness causing it to deal 40% damage but heals you with each strike. The heal is increased as your health dwindles and your thirst for blood gets greater.

Lowers your blood count to emit a wave of blood dealing Moderate Damage up to 3 enemies. Regains some of your spilled blood a couple of moments after casting, made stronger by stacks from Crimson Ritual. Also applies Decay, Cannot Heal to your foes for 6 seconds. (Costs 10% of Max Health per target)

Blasts adaptive magic energy hitting up to 3 targets, dealing escalating Weapon Damage. Applies Hypothermia to your opponent and Hyperthermia to you, lowering their haste by 5% and increasing yours by 20% for 6 seconds. This effect is buffed by Crimson Ritual. Also, has a 40% chance of stunning enemies for 3 seconds.

Absorbs all life force around you, preparing a massive attack. Applies Wrath of the Blood Mage on the user and up to 3 hostile targets, Heals you while mirroring some of the healing on to your enemies. After a few moments, unleashes Cataclysmic Spell Damage to all your foes while mirroring some of the damage back on yourself. Can't Miss but can't Crit.

Lowers your blood count to empower yourself, granting you new awaken abilities. Applies Vermilion Pact, increasing your Healing by 20%, Arcane Pact, increasing your Spell Damage by 50%, and Mirroring Pact, increasing your Damage Resistance by 10%. All pacts last for 18 seconds and stack to 5. (Costs 10% of Max Health)
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Sentinel.sDesc: Sentinels are powerful, elite defenders of Lore. They continually watch over the land for wrongdoing and are quick to act when called upon, fighting with techniques that prevent underhanded trickery
aMRM: Sentinels gain mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on crits. The amount depends on the damage relative to *their own* HP total.

passive.desc: Haste increased by 30%.
Damage Resistance increased by 20%.

passive.nam: The Western Covenant - Alpha and Omega
passive.desc:
Starting from Rank 1, all skills except The Western Covenant apply The Watch Eternal, reducing your target's Dodge by 25%, stacks to 20. At rank 10, increases STR by 30% and END by 15%.

The Lord Protectress watches. In Omnia Paratus.

active.desc:
Your devastating, unavoidable blade is one of rite and fury. Recite the Preamble, increasing your Physical and Magical Resistance by 80% for 3 seconds. Upholding your oath applies In Omnia Paratus, blocking further recitations.

If Castellan Doctrine is present, applies Overwatch, reducing your target’s Crit Chance by 15% and Luck by 30%. If Venator Doctrine is present, applies Beholden, reducing your target’s Hit Chance by 15% and Damage Resistance by 30%. Both effects last 15 seconds.
A guaranteed critical strike that deals damage based on your current health. Applies Defensive Stance, a HoT for 7 seconds. Replaces Offensive Stance.
Deals damage and heals you. The lower your health, the greater the damage and healing are. Applies Offensive Stance, increasing your Crit Damage by 50% for 7 seconds. Replaces Defensive Stance.

Applies The Western Covenant, increasing your outgoing physical damage, STR, and END by 50%, and DoT Resistance by 80%. If you are in Defensive Stance, applies Castellan Doctrine, further increasing your END by 50%. If you are in Offensive Stance, applies Venator Doctrine, increasing your Crit Chance and Physical Resistance by 35%. Effects last 15 seconds. Both Doctrines consume each other.

You perform a single strike for massive damage based on the number of The Watch Eternal stacks on the target while consuming those stacks and applying Austerity, healing you after 1 second. Applies Exigency Clause, reducing your target's Heal Power by 95% for 7 seconds. Lastly, applies two stacks of The Watch Eternal.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Thief of Hours.sDesc: Students of the Way of The Clock style of martial arts, these monks are trained to manipulate time magic to steal hours from their foes and use them to increase their own time to study and perfect their fighting style.
aMRM: Thieves of Hours gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Dodge any attack (restores HP as well)

passive.desc: Hit Chance and Dodge increased by 10%.
Crit Chance increased by 10%.
Healing Power increased by 50%.

active.desc: A basic attack, taught to all adventurers. Damage dealt is based on your weapon damage.

Attack at your foe's pressure points to steal seconds from their life, dealing damage and causing you to move faster. Applies Stolen Life and Accelerating to you, increasing Dodge by 4%, stacking to 3, and Haste by 12%. Both effects last 10 seconds.

If Reverse Time is active, it's consumed to apply Reverse Aging, increasing your Dodge by 12% and Haste by 12% for 15 seconds.

Strike your target with your Temporal Fist, applying a stack of Deadlock to yourself. Using this skill while you have 4 stacks of Deadlock consumes them to apply Reverse Time, an HoT for 3 seconds. Can't miss.

Utilize the flow of time to strike at your foe. Deals damage and applies Time Ripple and Time Fracture, increasing your Crit Chance by 5% and your Crit Damage by 15% for 15 seconds, stacks to 3.

If Reverse Time is active, it's consumed to apply Reverse Flow, increasing your Crit Chance by 15% and Crit damage by 45% for 15 seconds.

Wraps your target in a swirling torrent of time. Applies Temporal Insanity, causing your target to hit itself instead of you, and Counterstance, reducing your Dodge by 100%. Both effects last 6 seconds. If your target is immune to Temporal Insanity, applies Temporal Bubble instead of Counterstance, increasing your Dodge and Damage Resistance by 20% for 12 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

aMRM: Rogues gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Dodge any attack (restores HP as well)

passive.desc: Crit Damage increased by 20% and Dodge increased by 25%.

Starting at rank 1, your skills strike your target's Vitals, applying a DoT based on the damage of the skill used and guaranteeing that skill's chance based effects to apply. This effect has a 5 second cooldown. At rank 4, increases your Dexterity by 20%.
Outgoing Damage increased by 20%.

active.desc: A blade strike from the hilt, fast enough to hit before your opponent gets a chance to act.
Unleash a fury of steel to strike at up to 4 targets. Has a 25% chance per target hit to apply Bladefury, increasing Crit Chance by 15% and Crit Damage by 50% for 5 seconds.
A technique used to deflect incoming attacks and strike back at your target. Grants Evasion, increasing your Dodge by 25% and Crit Chance by 15% for 25 seconds. Also resets the cooldown of Technique.

Strike at your target's tendons to deal moderate damage and affect their ability to fight back significantly, reducing Outgoing Damage by 70% for 5 seconds. Also has a 35% chance to apply Precise Cut, reducing Damage Resistance by 30% for 5 seconds.
Attempt to split your target in two with a powerful strike. Has a 50% chance to stun your target for 2 seconds and a 50% chance to apply Spinning Dragon, reducing their next attack to 0 damage.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

TimeKeeper.sDesc: You are a rare breed of hunter who travels the breadth of space and time hunting your prey. Are you a bounty hunter? Do you hunt the most dangerous monsters in history? Do you track down history's greatest treasures?
aMRM: TimerKillers gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Dodge any attack (restores HP as well)

passive.desc: Increase Dodge by 15%
Reduce Damage Taken by 10% and increase Hit Chance by 10%
DoT damage taken reduced by 60%.

active.desc: A basic attack, taught to all adventurers. Damage dealt is based on your weapon damage.
Slow your target's local time, reducing their Haste by 20% for 10 seconds. Also applies a stack of Temporal Rift.
Surround yourself or an ally in a bubble of compressed time. The target will heal, regain mana, have their Dodge increased by 25%, and Haste increased by 30% for 10 seconds.

If Temporal Rift is active, deal damage to your target based on the amount you've dealt in up to the past 10 seconds while it was active. Damage scales with each stack of Temporal Rift and consumes those stacks. Also applies Relive The Past, which damages them over 8 seconds.
Deals a large amount of damage to your target and locks them in time for 2 seconds. Also applies a stack of Temporal Rift.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Troll Spellsmith.sDesc: The Trolls are masters of magics and logic and the SpellSmith has mastered these arts to give them a major advantage in battle.
aMRM: Troll Spellsmiths gain mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on crits. The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total.

passive.desc: Outgoing magic damage increased by 10%.
Hit Chance and Crit Chance increased by 10%.
Haste increased by 10%. Spellsmith Sigil has a small chance to apply Troll Control, increasing your Haste by 100% for 20 seconds.

active.desc: Strike your target with a magic infused blade. Damage dealt is increased by your Sigil stacks.
Calls on the power of electricity to arc from one foe to the next, reducing the Haste of each foe hit by 7% for 10 seconds, stacks to 3.
A freezing fire that deals damage while applying Chilled and Seared. Chilled stuns your target for 2 seconds while Seared reduces your target's outgoing damage by 20% for 10 seconds.
Focus your energy into your sigils. Applies Sigil Overload for 15 seconds, increasing your outgoing damage by 10%, but consumes any stacks of Spellsmith Shield you have.

Heals you for a small amount and applies Sigil, increasing your Crit Chance by 5% and causing your other skills to deal increased damage for each stack. Also applies Spellsmith Shield, increasing your Damage Resistance by 7%. Both effects stack to 5 and last 15 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

aMRM: Undead Goats gain mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on crits. The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total.

passive.desc: Haste increased by 20%.
Damage Resistance increased by 15%.

When Foraging, you have an extremely small chance to find an invinci-berry. The berry brings out the true goat within for 8 seconds, increasing your outgoing physical damage by 100% and making you invincible for the duration.

active.desc: A basic attack, taught to all... goats??? Damage dealt is based on your weapon damage. Gather Grass as you attack, which stacks to 8 and is used by your other abilities.

You use your unsettling undead goat noises to send a deafening wave at your target. Applies Inhuman Scream, increasing your Crit Chance by 3% and the damage of subsequent screams for 8 seconds, stacks to 5.

If you're not Free Range, applies Downhill Battle, reducing your target's outgoing damage by 20% for 20 seconds.

If you're Free Range, applies Uphill Battle, increasing your outgoing damage by 15% for 10 seconds.

Charge your target with your thick skull, stunning them for 3 seconds and applying Head Injury, reducing their Dodge by 10% and blocking the next stun for 12 seconds.

If you're not Free Range, applies Fenced Off, reducing your target's Haste and Crit Chance by 10% for 20 seconds.

If you're Free Range, this skill deals increased damage.

Your stronger goat frame fortifies. Heals you based on your stacks of Grass Gathered while consuming those stacks and applying Steel Frame, increasing your Damage Resistance by 40% for 20 seconds and removing Free Range if it's active.

Use your collected grass to summon a herd of undead goats. Damage dealt is increased for each stack of Grass Gathered. Applies Free Range for 10 seconds, which increases your STR by 50% and is used by your other abilities.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Void Highlord.sDesc: Nulgath ranks you a Void Highlord and bestows a portion of his power to you. You are a sinister brute bringing anyone to your knees. Half of your soul has been taken by Nulgath as for the price of this untamed power, use it wisely.
aMRM: Void Highlords gain mana from all hits landed in combat, and especially on crits.  The amount depends on damage relative to *their own* HP total

passive.desc: Increases Hit Chance and Crit Chance by 20%
Incoming damage reduced by 20%

Starting at rank 1, all skills (excluding Contract) have a 20% chance to apply Insolent Fools, increasing your Endurance by 30% while healing you over time for 3 seconds. At rank 10, Undying Highlord permanently increases your Endurance by 50% and Armageddon increases your opponent’s incoming damage by 5% for 20 seconds, stacks to 10.

active.desc: Seal your opponent's fate. If Shackled is active, applies Soul Fend to yourself, a HoT for 5 seconds, stacks to 5. If Unshackled is active, applies Soul Breach to your target, a DoT for 5 seconds, stacks to 5.

Binds your soul for protection, dealing damage while reducing your incoming damage by 50% for 15 seconds. Also applies Soul Void, increasing your Haste, HoT power, and DoT power by 30% for 12 seconds. Always crits and can't miss. Costs 20% of your maximum health. (Replaces Unshackled)

Strike fear into your opponent with the eyes of the Void, dealing damage and feeding off their despair, healing you. Has a 30% chance to stun and applies Congealed, reducing their Hit Chance, Haste, and Dodge by 20% for 6 seconds.

Releases your soul for destruction, dealing damage while increasing your outgoing damage by 50% for 15 seconds. Also applies Soul Void, increasing your Haste, HoT power, and DoT power by 30% for 12 seconds. Always crits and can't miss. Costs 20% of your maximum health. (Replaces Shackled)

Spawn a portal straight to the Void itself to call a mass amount of swords to do your bidding, dealing cataclysmic damage. Applies Arbiter's Wrath, increasing your Crit Damage by 75% for 12 seconds. Also applies Kneel Before the Nation, increasing your outgoing damage and reducing your incoming damage by 50% for 12 seconds. At rank 10, you sacrifice your opponent’s soul to the Void, increasing their incoming damage by 5% for 20 seconds, stacks to 10.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Verus DoomKnight.sDesc: Power beyond imagination. Complete domination of Lore. The humiliation of your enemies. It's what you deserve. There needs to be a Champion of Doom, and that role was meant for you.
aMRM: The Verus DoomKnight gains mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Are struck by an enemy in combat

passive.desc: Hit Chance and Haste increased by 20%.
Endurance and Damage Resistance increased by 50%.

Starting at rank 1, all skills (except Necrotic Blade) grant you 1 stack of Doom, which stacks to 10 and is used for Unleash Doom. While Unleashed Doom is active, you can't gain stacks of Doom. At rank 10, increases your Crit Chance by 10%.

active.desc: Strike your target with your Doom Blade. Applies Weakened, reducing your target's outgoing damage by 15% for 20 seconds

Ravage your target's soul, severely crippling their defenses. Applies Fractured Soul, reducing your target's Damage Resistance by 50% and Physical and Magical Resistance by 30% for 8 seconds. 

If Unleashed Doom is active, applies Shattered Soul, reducing your target's Physical and Magical Resistance by an additional 30% for 5 seconds. 

If Darkness is gathered, applies Cataclysm, increasing your Crit Chance by 20% and Crit Damage by 50% for 20 seconds.

Carve into your target, draining life from them and applying Lingering Darkness, a DoT for 6 seconds.

If Unleashed Doom is active, applies Necrotic Warmth, restoring your HP over 5 seconds.

If Darkness is gathered, applies Veil of Darkness, increasing your Damage Resistance by 50% for 20 seconds.

Raise spikes from the ground, piercing your target. Applies Spiked, reducing your target's Haste and Dodge by 15% for 8 seconds. Can't miss.

If Unleashed Doom is active, applies Skewered, reducing your target's Haste and Dodge by an additional 15% for 5 seconds, while also stunning them for 1 second. 

If Darkness is gathered, applies Demise, increasing your outgoing damage by 15% for 20 seconds.

Release calamitous shadows upon your target, inflicting them with Decay which negates all non lifesteal healing they receive for 3 seconds. If you have 10 stacks of Doom, they are consumed to apply Unleashed Doom, empowering your skills and increasing your outgoing damage by 25% and Haste by 50% for 8 seconds. Can't miss. 

If Unleashed Doom is activated or is already active, you Gather Darkness, empowering the next skill you use (except Necrotic Blade) with an additional effect.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Naval Commander.sDesc: True Naval commanders know they need to battle with a crew!
aMRM: Naval Commander gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Dodge any attack (restores HP as well)

passive.desc: Crit Chance increased by 20%.
Haste increased by 10% and Dodge increased by 30%.
Damage Resistance increased by 15%.

active.desc: An attack taught to all Naval Commanders. Damage dealt is based on your weapon damage. You are invigorated by combat itself and recover 5 mana on hit. Can't miss.
Perform a Counterthrust with your cutlass, reducing your target's outgoing damage by 40% for 1 second. Also applies Strike'n Parry, further reducing Outgoing Damage by 30% for 10 seconds.
Fire your pistol at your target, wounding them and reducing their Damage Resistance by 30% for 10 seconds.

The presence of the captain inspires everyone in battle. Grants you and your allies an HoT and increases Haste and Outgoing Damage by 15%. Also applies a stack of Armada to you for each ally, increasing the damage of all skills except En Garde by 50%, stacks to 4. Effects last 15 seconds.

You sidestep attacks with your Sea Legs, increasing your Dodge by 30% for 1 second.
You pull out your second pistol and unleash a hail of bullets. Applies Focus for 4 seconds, which forces your target to attack only you for the duration.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

MechaJouster.sDesc: Crash into battle on your clockwork steed!
aMRM: Mecha Jousters gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Are struck by an enemy in combat

passive.desc: Damage Resistance increased by 10%.
Endurance increased by 75%.
Outgoing damage increased by 15%.

active.desc: A not so basic attack taught to all Jousters. CHAAARGE! Stuns your target for 2 seconds and then knocks them Off Balance, reducing their dodge by 35% and blocking the next stun for 12 seconds.
A piercing attack that punctures your target's armor if you have Momentum, increasing the damage they take by 50% for 10 seconds.
An accurate strike for unavoidable critical damage that increases your Hit Chance by 30% for 6 seconds. If your target is affected by Punctured, they will bleed for 8 seconds.
Repair your mechanical parts, restoring a large amount of health.

A battle cry granting the Jouster a boost in momentum, increasing your Haste by 20% while demoralizing your opponent, reducing their Damage Resistance by 20%. Both effects last 15 seconds. Also applies Prepared Strike, causing your next two Jousts to be unavoidable critical hits.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Ultra Elemental Warrior.sDesc: You've wielded the 8 Elementals and are now able to MASTER them as an Ultra Elemental Warrior!
aMRM: Elemental Warriors gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Are struck by an enemy in combat

passive.desc: The power of darkness grants you 15% increased Strength and 75% increased Endurance.
The power of Light grants you 15% increased Intellect and 12% increased Haste and Hit Chance.

Starting at rank 1, when invoking Elemental Power, you have a very small chance of creating powerful Ice Magic. Fusing this magic with different elements can lead to very brief but powerful effects.

Ice and Fire makes you Supercritical, increasing your STR and INT by 200%, and LUK by 20%.
Ice and Earth creates Hailstone, healing you greatly.
Ice and Energy creates Hoarfrost, reducing your Mana Cost by 200% for 5 seconds- causing you to generate mana instead!

active.desc: Strike your opponents from a further range with your Axe.

Infuse yourself with Elemental Power, reducing your mana cost and Damage Taken by 15% for 5 seconds and priming your elemental abilities. Your blade rends the air, inflicting your foe with a Mana Rift, decreasing their Dodge and Crit Chance by 15% for 10 seconds. Cannot miss but cannot crit.

Strike your opponent with fiery wrath, dealing large damage and converting your Elemental Power to Fire Magic. If you possess Earth Magic, the fusion makes you Incandescent, increasing your Endurance by 100% and Healing Intake by 200% for 20 seconds. If you possess Energy Magic, the fusion grants you Critical Mass, increasing your Crit Chance by 25% and Crit Damage by 125% for 10 seconds.

Call upon the power of the earth, healing yourself. If Elemental Power is present, you heal twice as much and convert it into Earth magic. If you possess Fire Magic, the fusion creates Molten Armor, reducing the damage you take by 60% for 20 seconds. If you possess Energy Magic, the fusion grants you an Earthen Blessing, healing you for a small amount over the next 20 seconds.

Overloaded mana bursts forth from your weapon, dealing great damage to your foe based on your current mana and converting your Elemental Power to Energy Magic. If you possess Fire Magic, the fusion turns you into a Superconductor, increasing your Damage by 50% for 10 seconds. If you possess Earth Magic, the fusion Grounds you, increasing your Haste by 20% for 10 seconds.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Barber.sDesc: Hair today, gone tomorrow! Be a barber and control the destiny of your friends and neighbors.
aMRM: Barbers gain mana when they:
-Strike an enemy in combat (more effective on crits)
-Are struck by an enemy in combat

passive.desc: Endurance increased by 15%
Reduces damage taken by 15%.
Dodge increased by 10%

active.desc: A rapid attack studied only by a reclusive few. Damage dealt is based on weapon damage.
Snip away at your foe by attacking quickly, applying two separate Damage over Time effects. Both last 6 seconds and stack to 4.

Your friends around you are captivated by your charisma and wisdom and are more motivated in combat. Applies Looking Sharp and Encouraged to you and up to 2 allies, which increases Crit Chance by 5%, stacking to 5, and Haste by 10%. Both effects last 10 seconds.

Your handy dandy barbicide comes to the rescue. Applies Blinded and Sticky to your target. If they are already Blinded and Sticky, they will become Slowed. 
Blinded: -30% Hit Chance
Sticky: -20% Haste
Slowed: -20% Dodge 
Effects last 10 seconds and don't refresh.
As a Barber of the highest quality, you don't know when to stop, so give it all you got and hit them where it hurts!... while you still have the mana. Has a higher than average chance to crit.
Equip a potion or scroll from your inventory to use it here.

Bard.sDesc:
Favored Enhancement: Healer.
Bards are musicians who have a dramatic effect on the tide of battle.  They are valuable allies in a strong group.
aMRM: Bards don't use mana. They rely on their songs to conduct the flow of battle.

passive.desc: WIS increased by 20%.
Haste, Hit Chance, and Crit Chance increased by 10%.

active.desc: Enemies are as affected by your song as by any attack.

Drums of War inspire you and your allies, increasing outgoing damage by 20%, Haste by 10%, and Crit Chance by 5% for 10 seconds. Also applies Drumbeat, causing your other skills to apply an additional effect based on the order they're used in.

Direct a high pitched sound at your target. Deals damage and applies Crescendo to your target, a DoT that gets stronger with each tick, lasts 10 seconds and doesn't refresh. Can't miss.

Drumbeat effect:
Skill 4 > Skill 5 > Skill 3 - This skill deals increased damage.

Perfect for skirmishes, brawls, battles, wars, and fighting in general. Applies Healing Reel to you and your allies, an HoT for 10 seconds. 

Drumbeat effect:
Skill 5 > Skill 3 > Skill 4 - Applies Healing Jig to you and your allies, an additional HoT and increasing Damage Resistance by 15% for 10 seconds.

A tune so vile it drives your enemies mad. Applies Dissonance, reducing your target's outgoing damage, Haste, and Crit Chance by 15% while granting additional mana to allies striking the target for 10 seconds.

Drumbeat effect:
Skill 3 > Skill 4 > Skill 5 - Applies Cacophony to your target, reducing their Damage Resistance by 15% for 10 seconds.

De damage to target. Applies Crescendo, a DoT that gets stronger every time the target is attacked, lasting 10 seconds.

Reduces the target's damage and haste by 15%, and critical strike chance by 5%, and grants additional mana to attackers striking the target for 15 seconds.

Heals a friendly target for a large amount immediately and up to 3 additional nearby targets for a smaller amount. Applies Radiance to the first target, healing for an additional amount over 16 seconds.

Reduces friendly target's Mana costs by 50% for 10 seconds

DeathKnight.sDesc: Have you been pulled from the cold comfort of death to serve a new master or has your own will pulled you back to the land of the living to continue fighting?
aMRM: Death Knights gain mana whenever an enemy takes damage from one of the Death Knight's skills.

passive.desc: Increase Str by 12%
Physical Damage taken reduced by 20%
DoT damage done increased by 20%

active.desc: You slowly chip away at your opponent. Applies Soul Slash to your opponent, dealing damage over time. Lasts 1 second unless reapplied and doesn't stack. Can't miss.

The chill of death seeps into your foe. Death's Chill deals damage over time while Decay, Cannot Heal prevents an enemy from healing. Also applies Frozen Core which increases all DoT damage and heals received by 5% for 16 seconds and stacks to 5. Auras last 16 seconds unless reapplied. Can't miss.
Causes Frostbite, a damage over time effect that also slows your foe's haste by 20% for 10 seconds. Can't miss.

Causes Deathgrip on your foe. Your foe feels the life slowly crushed out of them causing damage over time and reducing the damage they do by 20% for 15 seconds. Has a 10% chance to stun for 6 seconds. Can't miss.

You tap into the power of Death to pull your form back together. Causes you to heal over time and reduces physical damage you take by 50% for 12 seconds. Also applies Death's Release to your target dealing significant damage after 5 seconds. Can't miss.

passive.desc: Outgoing Physical Damage and Strength increased by 10%.

Hit Chance increased by 30% and Haste increased by 10%.

active.desc: A strong attack known only to disciplined fighters. Damage dealt is based on weapon damage.
Instantly attack, dealing additional damage based on your target's current health percentage while reducing their Damage Resistance by 15% for 5 seconds.
Strike and weaken an enemy, stunning them and negating all non lifesteal healing they receive for 3 seconds.

Fire an explosive, dealing unavoidable critical true damage to your target, increased the lower their health percentage is.

Incoming Damage reduced by 15%.

active.desc: A basic attack, taught to all adventurers. Deals physical damage based on your Spell Power.
Does damage and applies Frozen which reduces your opponents Haste and Dodge by 15% for 4 seconds.

Deals damage to your opponent. If Frozen is active, the amount of damage dealt is doubled. If Polar Vortex is active, it is consumed to apply Ice Age, increasing your Crit Chance by 20% for 16 seconds.

Conjures frozen tears from the most powerful cryomancers, applying an HoT for 14 seconds. If Polar Vortex is active, it is consumed to apply Frozen Defense, reducing your incoming damage by 30% and increasing your Healing Power by 100% for 16 seconds.
Rapidly freeze your opponent, dealing massive damage while applying Absolute Zero, stunning them for 3 seconds. Also applies Polar Vortex for 8 seconds, which is used by your other abilities.
